Notation "_ ^op" was already used in scope cat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Examples.Three.

New coercion path [fact_functor;
                   functor_data_from_functor;
                   functor_on_objects] : functorial_factorization >-> Funclass is ambiguous with existing 
[fact_section; section_disp_on_objects] : functorial_factorization >-> Funclass.
[ambiguous-paths,coercions,default]

Require Import UniMath.ModelCategories.Helpers.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope morcls.


Ltac functorial_factorization_mor_eq f := (
  apply subtypePath; [intro; apply isaprop_section_nat_trans_disp_axioms|];
  use funextsec;
  intro f;
  use subtypePath; [intro; apply isapropdirprod; apply homset_property|]
).

Section Ff_composition.

Context {C : category}.

(* F' ⊗ F (compose left factors) *)

C: category
F', F: Ff C
section_disp_data (three_disp C)


C: category
F', F: Ff C
section_disp_data (three_disp C)

  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
∏ x : arrow C, three_disp C x
C: category
F', F: Ff C
(λ Fob : ∏ x : arrow C, three_disp C x,
 ∏ (x y : arrow C) (f : arrow C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 Fob x -->[ f] Fob y) ?pr1

F', F: Ff C
∏ x : arrow C, three_disp C x

f: arrow C
three_disp C f

C: category
F', F: Ff C
f: arrow C
lf:= fact_L F f: arrow C
rf:= fact_R F f: arrow C
l'rf:= fact_L F' rf: arrow C
r'rf:= fact_R F' rf: arrow C
three_disp C f

    
C: category
F', F: Ff C
f: arrow C
lf:= fact_L F f: arrow C
rf:= fact_R F f: arrow C
l'rf:= fact_L F' rf: arrow C
r'rf:= fact_R F' rf: arrow C
∑ (xz : C ⟦ arrow_dom f, arrow_cod l'rf ⟧)
(zy : C ⟦ arrow_cod l'rf, arrow_cod f ⟧), xz · zy = f

    
C: category
F', F: Ff C
f: arrow C
lf:= fact_L F f: arrow C
rf:= fact_R F f: arrow C
l'rf:= fact_L F' rf: arrow C
r'rf:= fact_R F' rf: arrow C
three_mor01 (F f) · three_mor01 (F' rf)
· three_mor12 (F' rf) = f

    abstract (
      etrans; [apply assoc'|];
      etrans; [apply maponpaths;
               apply (three_comp ((fact_functor F') rf))|];
      simpl;
      etrans; [apply (three_comp (f,, _))|];
      reflexivity
    ).
  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
(λ Fob : ∏ x : arrow C, three_disp C x,
 ∏ (x y : arrow C) (f : arrow C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 Fob x -->[ f] Fob y)
  (λ f : arrow C,
   let lf := fact_L F f in
   let rf := fact_R F f in
   let l'rf := fact_L F' rf in
   let r'rf := fact_R F' rf in
   arrow_cod l'rf,,
   three_mor01 (F f) · three_mor01 (F' rf),,
   three_mor12 (F' rf),, Ff_lcomp_data_subproof F' F f)
 
C: category
F', F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
(let lf := fact_L F f in
 let rf := fact_R F f in
 let l'rf := fact_L F' rf in
 let r'rf := fact_R F' rf in
 arrow_cod l'rf,,
 three_mor01 (F f) · three_mor01 (F' rf),,
 three_mor12 (F' rf),, Ff_lcomp_data_subproof F' F f) -->[
γ] (let lf := fact_L F f' in
    let rf := fact_R F f' in
    let l'rf := fact_L F' rf in
    let r'rf := fact_R F' rf in
    arrow_cod l'rf,,
    three_mor01 (F f') · three_mor01 (F' rf),,
    three_mor12 (F' rf),,
    Ff_lcomp_data_subproof F' F f')

    
C: category
F', F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
lγ:= # (fact_L F) γ: arrow C ⟦ fact_L F f, fact_L F f' ⟧
(let lf := fact_L F f in
 let rf := fact_R F f in
 let l'rf := fact_L F' rf in
 let r'rf := fact_R F' rf in
 arrow_cod l'rf,,
 three_mor01 (F f) · three_mor01 (F' rf),,
 three_mor12 (F' rf),, Ff_lcomp_data_subproof F' F f) -->[
γ] (let lf := fact_L F f' in

    let l'rf := fact_L F' rf in
    let r'rf := fact_R F' rf in
    arrow_cod l'rf,,

C: category
F', F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
lγ:= # (fact_L F) γ: arrow C ⟦ fact_L F f, fact_L F f' ⟧
rγ:= # (fact_R F) γ: arrow C ⟦ fact_R F f, fact_R F f' ⟧
(let lf := fact_L F f in
 let rf := fact_R F f in
 let l'rf := fact_L F' rf in
 let r'rf := fact_R F' rf in
 arrow_cod l'rf,,
 three_mor01 (F f) · three_mor01 (F' rf),,
 three_mor12 (F' rf),, Ff_lcomp_data_subproof F' F f) -->[
γ] (let lf := fact_L F f' in
    let rf := fact_R F f' in

C: category
F', F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
lγ:= # (fact_L F) γ: arrow C ⟦ fact_L F f, fact_L F f' ⟧
rγ:= # (fact_R F) γ: arrow C ⟦ fact_R F f, fact_R F f' ⟧
l'rγ:= # (fact_L F') rγ: arrow C ⟦ fact_L F' (fact_R F f),
fact_L F' (fact_R F f') ⟧
(let lf := fact_L F f in
 let rf := fact_R F f in
 let l'rf := fact_L F' rf in
 let r'rf := fact_R F' rf in
 arrow_cod l'rf,,
 three_mor01 (F f) · three_mor01 (F' rf),,
 three_mor12 (F' rf),, Ff_lcomp_data_subproof F' F f) -->[
γ] (let lf := fact_L F f' in
    let rf := fact_R F f' in
    let l'rf := fact_L F' rf in
    let r'rf := fact_R F' rf in
    arrow_cod l'rf,,

    three_mor12 (F' rf),,
    Ff_lcomp_data_subproof F' F f')

    
C: category
F', F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
lγ:= # (fact_L F) γ: arrow C ⟦ fact_L F f, fact_L F f' ⟧
rγ:= # (fact_R F) γ: arrow C ⟦ fact_R F f, fact_R F f' ⟧
l'rγ:= # (fact_L F') rγ: arrow C ⟦ fact_L F' (fact_R F f),
fact_L F' (fact_R F f') ⟧
r'rγ:= # (fact_R F') rγ: arrow C ⟦ fact_R F' (fact_R F f),
fact_R F' (fact_R F f') ⟧
(let lf := fact_L F f in
 let rf := fact_R F f in
 let l'rf := fact_L F' rf in
 let r'rf := fact_R F' rf in
 arrow_cod l'rf,,
 three_mor01 (F f) · three_mor01 (F' rf),,
 three_mor12 (F' rf),, Ff_lcomp_data_subproof F' F f) -->[
γ] (let lf := fact_L F f' in
    let rf := fact_R F f' in
    let l'rf := fact_L F' rf in
    let r'rf := fact_R F' rf in
    arrow_cod l'rf,,
    three_mor01 (F f') · three_mor01 (F' rf),,
    three_mor12 (F' rf),,
    Ff_lcomp_data_subproof F' F f')

    
C: category
F', F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
lγ:= # (fact_L F) γ: arrow C ⟦ fact_L F f, fact_L F f' ⟧
rγ:= # (fact_R F) γ: arrow C ⟦ fact_R F f, fact_R F f' ⟧
l'rγ:= # (fact_L F') rγ: arrow C ⟦ fact_L F' (fact_R F f),
fact_L F' (fact_R F f') ⟧
r'rγ:= # (fact_R F') rγ: arrow C ⟦ fact_R F' (fact_R F f),
fact_R F' (fact_R F f') ⟧
pr12 (let lf := fact_L F f in
      let rf := fact_R F f in
      let l'rf := fact_L F' rf in
      let r'rf := fact_R F' rf in
      arrow_cod l'rf,,
      three_mor01 (F f) · three_mor01 (F' rf),,
      three_mor12 (F' rf),,
      Ff_lcomp_data_subproof F' F f)
· arrow_mor00 r'rγ =
pr11 γ
· pr12 (let lf := fact_L F f' in
        let rf := fact_R F f' in
        let l'rf := fact_L F' rf in
        let r'rf := fact_R F' rf in
        arrow_cod l'rf,,
        three_mor01 (F f') · three_mor01 (F' rf),,
        three_mor12 (F' rf),,
        Ff_lcomp_data_subproof F' F f')
× pr122 (let lf := fact_L F f in
         let rf := fact_R F f in
         let l'rf := fact_L F' rf in
         let r'rf := fact_R F' rf in
         arrow_cod l'rf,,
         three_mor01 (F f) · three_mor01 (F' rf),,
         three_mor12 (F' rf),,
         Ff_lcomp_data_subproof F' F f) · pr21 γ =
  arrow_mor00 r'rγ
  · pr122 (let lf := fact_L F f' in
           let rf := fact_R F f' in
           let l'rf := fact_L F' rf in
           let r'rf := fact_R F' rf in
           arrow_cod l'rf,,
           three_mor01 (F f') · three_mor01 (F' rf),,
           three_mor12 (F' rf),,
           Ff_lcomp_data_subproof F' F f')


    abstract (
      split; [
        etrans; [apply assoc'|];
        apply pathsinv0;
        etrans; [apply assoc|];
        etrans; [apply maponpaths_2;
                 exact (arrow_mor_comm lγ)|];
        etrans; [apply assoc'|];
        apply cancel_precomposition;
        exact (arrow_mor_comm l'rγ)
      | apply pathsinv0;
        exact (arrow_mor_comm r'rγ)
      ]
    ).
Defined.


C: category
F', F: Ff C
section_disp_axioms (Ff_lcomp_data F' F)


C: category
F', F: Ff C
section_disp_axioms (Ff_lcomp_data F' F)

  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
∏ x : arrow C,
section_disp_on_morphisms (Ff_lcomp_data F' F)
  (identity x) = id_disp (Ff_lcomp_data F' F x)
C: category
F', F: Ff C
∏ (x y z : arrow C) (f : arrow C ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : arrow C ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms (Ff_lcomp_data F' F) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (Ff_lcomp_data F' F) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms (Ff_lcomp_data F' F) g)%mor_disp

  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
∏ x : arrow C,
section_disp_on_morphisms (Ff_lcomp_data F' F)
  (identity x) = id_disp (Ff_lcomp_data F' F x)

f: arrow C
section_disp_on_morphisms (Ff_lcomp_data F' F)
  (identity f) = id_disp (Ff_lcomp_data F' F f)

f: arrow C

F', F: Ff C
f: arrow C
lf:= fact_L F f: arrow C
rf:= fact_R F f: arrow C
l'rf:= fact_L F' rf: arrow C
section_disp_on_morphisms (Ff_lcomp_data F' F)
  (identity f) = id_disp (Ff_lcomp_data F' F f)

    
C: category
F', F: Ff C
f: arrow C
lf:= fact_L F f: arrow C
rf:= fact_R F f: arrow C
l'rf:= fact_L F' rf: arrow C
r'rf:= fact_R F' rf: arrow C
section_disp_on_morphisms (Ff_lcomp_data F' F)
  (identity f) = id_disp (Ff_lcomp_data F' F f)

    
C: category
F', F: Ff C
f: arrow C
lf:= fact_L F f: arrow C
rf:= fact_R F f: arrow C
l'rf:= fact_L F' rf: arrow C
r'rf:= fact_R F' rf: arrow C
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms (Ff_lcomp_data F' F)
     (identity f)) =
pr1 (id_disp (Ff_lcomp_data F' F f))

    (* complex rewrite *)
    
C: category
F', F: Ff C
f: arrow C
lf:= fact_L F f: arrow C
rf:= fact_R F f: arrow C
l'rf:= fact_L F' rf: arrow C
r'rf:= fact_R F' rf: arrow C
three_mor11
  (mors_to_arrow_mor (three_mor12 (f,, F f))
     (three_mor12 (f,, F f))
     (three_mor11
        ((make_dirprod (identity (pr11 f))
            (identity (pr21 f)),, id_disp (pr2 f)),,
         section_disp_on_morphisms F
           (make_dirprod (identity (pr11 f))
              (identity (pr21 f)),, id_disp (pr2 f))))
     (identity (pr21 f))
     (face_map_0_data_subproof C (f,, F f) (f,, F f)
        ((make_dirprod (identity (pr11 f))
            (identity (pr21 f)),, id_disp (pr2 f)),,
         section_disp_on_morphisms F
           (make_dirprod (identity (pr11 f))
              (identity (pr21 f)),, id_disp (pr2 f)))),,
   section_disp_on_morphisms F'
     (mors_to_arrow_mor (three_mor12 (f,, F f))
        (three_mor12 (f,, F f))
        (three_mor11
           ((make_dirprod (identity (pr11 f))
               (identity (pr21 f)),, id_disp (pr2 f)),,
            section_disp_on_morphisms F
              (make_dirprod (identity (pr11 f))
                 (identity (pr21 f)),, id_disp (pr2 f))))
        (identity (pr21 f))
        (face_map_0_data_subproof C (f,, F f)
           (f,, F f)
           ((make_dirprod (identity (pr11 f))
               (identity (pr21 f)),, id_disp (pr2 f)),,
            section_disp_on_morphisms F
              (make_dirprod (identity (pr11 f))
                 (identity (pr21 f)),, id_disp (pr2 f)))))) =
identity
  (three_ob1
     ((make_dirprod (three_ob1 (f,, F f))
         (three_ob2 (f,, F f)),, three_mor12 (f,, F f)),,
      F'
        (make_dirprod (three_ob1 (f,, F f))
           (three_ob2 (f,, F f)),,
         three_mor12 (f,, F f))))

    
C: category
F', F: Ff C
f: arrow C
lf:= fact_L F f: arrow C
rf:= fact_R F f: arrow C
l'rf:= fact_L F' rf: arrow C
r'rf:= fact_R F' rf: arrow C
three_mor11
  (mors_to_arrow_mor (three_mor12 (f,, F f))
     (three_mor12 (f,, F f))
     (three_mor11
        ((make_dirprod (identity (pr11 f))
            (identity (pr21 f)),, id_disp (pr2 f)),,
         id_disp (pr1 F f))) (identity (pr21 f))
     (face_map_0_data_subproof C (f,, F f) (f,, F f)
        ((make_dirprod (identity (pr11 f))
            (identity (pr21 f)),, id_disp (pr2 f)),,
         id_disp (pr1 F f))),,
   section_disp_on_morphisms F'
     (mors_to_arrow_mor (three_mor12 (f,, F f))
        (three_mor12 (f,, F f))
        (three_mor11
           ((make_dirprod (identity (pr11 f))
               (identity (pr21 f)),, id_disp (pr2 f)),,
            id_disp (pr1 F f))) (identity (pr21 f))
        (face_map_0_data_subproof C (f,, F f)
           (f,, F f)
           ((make_dirprod (identity (pr11 f))
               (identity (pr21 f)),, id_disp (pr2 f)),,
            id_disp (pr1 F f))))) =
identity
  (three_ob1
     ((make_dirprod (three_ob1 (f,, F f))
         (three_ob2 (f,, F f)),, three_mor12 (f,, F f)),,
      F'
        (make_dirprod (three_ob1 (f,, F f))
           (three_ob2 (f,, F f)),,
         three_mor12 (f,, F f))))

    (* cbn.
    unfold three_mor11.
    cbn. *)

    
C: category
F', F: Ff C
f: arrow C
lf:= fact_L F f: arrow C
rf:= fact_R F f: arrow C
l'rf:= fact_L F' rf: arrow C
r'rf:= fact_R F' rf: arrow C
three_mor11
  (mors_to_arrow_mor (three_mor12 (f,, F f))
     (three_mor12 (f,, F f))
     (three_mor11
        ((make_dirprod (identity (pr11 f))
            (identity (pr21 f)),, id_disp (pr2 f)),,
         id_disp (pr1 F f))) (identity (pr21 f))
     (face_map_0_data_subproof C (f,, F f) (f,, F f)
        ((make_dirprod (identity (pr11 f))
            (identity (pr21 f)),, id_disp (pr2 f)),,
         id_disp (pr1 F f))),,
   section_disp_on_morphisms F'
     (mors_to_arrow_mor (three_mor12 (f,, F f))
        (three_mor12 (f,, F f))
        (three_mor11
           ((make_dirprod (identity (pr11 f))
               (identity (pr21 f)),, id_disp (pr2 f)),,
            id_disp (pr1 F f))) (identity (pr21 f))
        (face_map_0_data_subproof C (f,, F f)
           (f,, F f)
           ((make_dirprod (identity (pr11 f))
               (identity (pr21 f)),, id_disp (pr2 f)),,
            id_disp (pr1 F f))))) = ?b
C: category
F', F: Ff C
f: arrow C
lf:= fact_L F f: arrow C
rf:= fact_R F f: arrow C
l'rf:= fact_L F' rf: arrow C
r'rf:= fact_R F' rf: arrow C
?b =
identity
  (three_ob1
     ((make_dirprod (three_ob1 (f,, F f))
         (three_ob2 (f,, F f)),, 
       three_mor12 (f,, F f)),,
      F'
        (make_dirprod (three_ob1 (f,, F f))
           (three_ob2 (f,, F f)),,
         three_mor12 (f,, F f))))
 
C: category
F', F: Ff C
f: arrow C
lf:= fact_L F f: arrow C
rf:= fact_R F f: arrow C
l'rf:= fact_L F' rf: arrow C
r'rf:= fact_R F' rf: arrow C
pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms F' (identity rf)) =
identity
  (three_ob1
     ((make_dirprod (three_ob1 (f,, F f))
         (three_ob2 (f,, F f)),, three_mor12 (f,, F f)),,
      F'
        (make_dirprod (three_ob1 (f,, F f))
           (three_ob2 (f,, F f)),,
         three_mor12 (f,, F f))))

F', F: Ff C
f: arrow C
lf:= fact_L F f: arrow C

F', F: Ff C
f: arrow C
lf:= fact_L F f: arrow C
rf:= fact_R F f: arrow C
l'rf:= fact_L F' rf: arrow C

section_disp_on_morphisms F' (identity rf) = ?t2
C: category
F', F: Ff C
f: arrow C
lf:= fact_L F f: arrow C
rf:= fact_R F f: arrow C
l'rf:= fact_L F' rf: arrow C
r'rf:= fact_R F' rf: arrow C
pr1 ?t2 =
identity
  (three_ob1
     ((make_dirprod (three_ob1 (f,, F f))
         (three_ob2 (f,, F f)),, 
       three_mor12 (f,, F f)),,
      F'
        (make_dirprod (three_ob1 (f,, F f))
           (three_ob2 (f,, F f)),,
         three_mor12 (f,, F f))))

            
C: category
F', F: Ff C
f: arrow C
lf:= fact_L F f: arrow C
rf:= fact_R F f: arrow C
l'rf:= fact_L F' rf: arrow C
r'rf:= fact_R F' rf: arrow C
pr1 (id_disp (pr1 F' rf)) =
identity
  (three_ob1
     ((make_dirprod (three_ob1 (f,, F f))
         (three_ob2 (f,, F f)),, three_mor12 (f,, F f)),,
      F'
        (make_dirprod (three_ob1 (f,, F f))
           (three_ob2 (f,, F f)),,
         three_mor12 (f,, F f))))

    reflexivity.
  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
∏ (x y z : arrow C) (f : arrow C ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : arrow C ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms (Ff_lcomp_data F' F) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (Ff_lcomp_data F' F) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms (Ff_lcomp_data F' F) g)%mor_disp
 
C: category
F', F: Ff C
f, f', f'': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
γ': arrow C ⟦ f', f'' ⟧
section_disp_on_morphisms (Ff_lcomp_data F' F)
  (γ · γ') =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (Ff_lcomp_data F' F) γ ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms (Ff_lcomp_data F' F) γ')%mor_disp

    
C: category
F', F: Ff C
f, f', f'': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
γ': arrow C ⟦ f', f'' ⟧
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms (Ff_lcomp_data F' F)
     (γ · γ')) =
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms (Ff_lcomp_data F' F) γ ;; 
   section_disp_on_morphisms (Ff_lcomp_data F' F) γ')%mor_disp

    (* simpl.
    unfold arrow_mor00, three_mor11.
    simpl. *)

    
C: category
F', F: Ff C
f, f', f'': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
γ': arrow C ⟦ f', f'' ⟧
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms (Ff_lcomp_data F' F) γ ;; 
   section_disp_on_morphisms (Ff_lcomp_data F' F) γ')%mor_disp =
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms (Ff_lcomp_data F' F)
     (γ · γ'))

    
C: category
F', F: Ff C
f, f', f'': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
γ': arrow C ⟦ f', f'' ⟧
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms (Ff_lcomp_data F' F) γ ;; 
   section_disp_on_morphisms (Ff_lcomp_data F' F) γ')%mor_disp =
?b
C: category
F', F: Ff C
f, f', f'': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
γ': arrow C ⟦ f', f'' ⟧
?b =
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms (Ff_lcomp_data F' F)
     (γ · γ'))
 
C: category
F', F: Ff C
f, f', f'': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
γ': arrow C ⟦ f', f'' ⟧
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms F'
     (pr1 (# F' (# (fact_R F) γ))
      · pr1 (# F' (# (fact_R F) γ')))) =
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms (Ff_lcomp_data F' F)
     (γ · γ'))

    
C: category
F', F: Ff C
f, f', f'': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
γ': arrow C ⟦ f', f'' ⟧
arrow_mor00
  (pr1 (# F' (# (fact_R F) γ))
   · pr1 (# F' (# (fact_R F) γ'))) =
arrow_mor00 (# (fact_R F) (γ · γ'))
C: category
F', F: Ff C
f, f', f'': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
γ': arrow C ⟦ f', f'' ⟧
arrow_mor11
  (pr1 (# F' (# (fact_R F) γ))
   · pr1 (# F' (# (fact_R F) γ'))) =
arrow_mor11 (# (fact_R F) (γ · γ'))

    
C: category
F', F: Ff C
f, f', f'': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
γ': arrow C ⟦ f', f'' ⟧
arrow_mor00
  (pr1 (# F' (# (fact_R F) γ))
   · pr1 (# F' (# (fact_R F) γ'))) =
arrow_mor00 (# (fact_R F) (γ · γ'))
 apply pr1_section_disp_on_morphisms_comp.
    
C: category
F', F: Ff C
f, f', f'': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
γ': arrow C ⟦ f', f'' ⟧
arrow_mor11
  (pr1 (# F' (# (fact_R F) γ))
   · pr1 (# F' (# (fact_R F) γ'))) =
arrow_mor11 (# (fact_R F) (γ · γ'))
 reflexivity.
Qed.

Definition Ff_lcomp (F' F : Ff C) : Ff C :=
    (_,, Ff_lcomp_axioms F' F).

Notation "F' ⊗ F" := (Ff_lcomp F' F).

(* I *)

C: category
section_disp_data (three_disp C)


C: category
section_disp_data (three_disp C)

  
C: category
∏ x : arrow C, three_disp C x
C: category
(λ Fob : ∏ x : arrow C, three_disp C x,
 ∏ (x y : arrow C) (f : arrow C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 Fob x -->[ f] Fob y) ?pr1

  
C: category
∏ x : arrow C, three_disp C x
 
C: category
f: arrow C
three_disp C f

    
C: category
f: arrow C
∑ (xz : C ⟦ arrow_dom f, arrow_dom f ⟧)
(zy : C ⟦ arrow_dom f, arrow_cod f ⟧), xz · zy = f

    
C: category
f: arrow C
identity (arrow_dom f) · pr2 f = f

    abstract (apply id_left).
  
C: category
(λ Fob : ∏ x : arrow C, three_disp C x,
 ∏ (x y : arrow C) (f : arrow C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 Fob x -->[ f] Fob y)
  (λ f : arrow C,
   arrow_dom f,,
   identity (arrow_dom f),,
   pr2 f,, Ff_lcomp_unit_data_subproof f)
 
C: category
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
(arrow_dom f,,
 identity (arrow_dom f),,
 pr2 f,, Ff_lcomp_unit_data_subproof f) -->[
γ] (arrow_dom f',,
    identity (arrow_dom f'),,
    pr2 f',, Ff_lcomp_unit_data_subproof f')

    
C: category
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr12 (arrow_dom f,,
      identity (arrow_dom f),,
      pr2 f,, Ff_lcomp_unit_data_subproof f)
· arrow_mor00 γ =
pr11 γ
· pr12 (arrow_dom f',,
        identity (arrow_dom f'),,
        pr2 f',, Ff_lcomp_unit_data_subproof f')
× pr122 (arrow_dom f,,
         identity (arrow_dom f),,
         pr2 f,, Ff_lcomp_unit_data_subproof f)
  · pr21 γ =
  arrow_mor00 γ
  · pr122 (arrow_dom f',,
           identity (arrow_dom f'),,
           pr2 f',, Ff_lcomp_unit_data_subproof f')

    abstract (
      split; [
        etrans; [apply id_left|];
        apply pathsinv0;
        apply id_right
        | apply pathsinv0; exact (arrow_mor_comm γ)]
    ).
Defined.


C: category
section_disp_axioms Ff_lcomp_unit_data


C: category
section_disp_axioms Ff_lcomp_unit_data

  
C: category
∏ x : arrow C,
section_disp_on_morphisms Ff_lcomp_unit_data
  (identity x) = id_disp (Ff_lcomp_unit_data x)
C: category
∏ (x y z : arrow C) (f : arrow C ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : arrow C ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms Ff_lcomp_unit_data (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms Ff_lcomp_unit_data f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms Ff_lcomp_unit_data g)%mor_disp

  
C: category
∏ x : arrow C,
section_disp_on_morphisms Ff_lcomp_unit_data
  (identity x) = id_disp (Ff_lcomp_unit_data x)
 
C: category
f: arrow C
section_disp_on_morphisms Ff_lcomp_unit_data
  (identity f) = id_disp (Ff_lcomp_unit_data f)

    
C: category
f: arrow C
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms Ff_lcomp_unit_data
     (identity f)) =
pr1 (id_disp (Ff_lcomp_unit_data f))

    reflexivity.
  
C: category
∏ (x y z : arrow C) (f : arrow C ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : arrow C ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms Ff_lcomp_unit_data (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms Ff_lcomp_unit_data f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms Ff_lcomp_unit_data g)%mor_disp
 
C: category
f, f', f'': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
γ': arrow C ⟦ f', f'' ⟧
section_disp_on_morphisms Ff_lcomp_unit_data (γ · γ') =
(section_disp_on_morphisms Ff_lcomp_unit_data γ ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms Ff_lcomp_unit_data γ')%mor_disp

    
C: category
f, f', f'': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
γ': arrow C ⟦ f', f'' ⟧
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms Ff_lcomp_unit_data
     (γ · γ')) =
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms Ff_lcomp_unit_data γ ;; 
   section_disp_on_morphisms Ff_lcomp_unit_data γ')%mor_disp

    reflexivity.
Qed.

Definition Ff_lcomp_unit : Ff C :=
    (_,, Ff_lcomp_unit_axioms).


C: category
F: Ff C
section_nat_trans_disp_data (Ff_lcomp_unit ⊗ F) F


C: category
F: Ff C
section_nat_trans_disp_data (Ff_lcomp_unit ⊗ F) F

  
C: category
F: Ff C
f: arrow C
(Ff_lcomp_unit ⊗ F) f -->[ identity f] F f

  
C: category
F: Ff C
f: arrow C
pr12 ((Ff_lcomp_unit ⊗ F) f)
· identity (pr1 ((Ff_lcomp_unit ⊗ F) f)) =
pr11 (identity f) · pr12 (F f)
× pr122 ((Ff_lcomp_unit ⊗ F) f) · pr21 (identity f) =
  identity (pr1 ((Ff_lcomp_unit ⊗ F) f)) · pr122 (F f)

  abstract (
    split; [etrans; [apply id_right|]|]; (
      etrans; [apply id_right|];
      apply pathsinv0;
      apply id_left
    )
  ).
Defined.

F: Ff C
section_nat_trans_disp_axioms (Ff_l_id_left_data F)

F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
transportf (mor_disp ((Ff_lcomp_unit ⊗ F) f) (F f'))
  (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
  (section_disp_on_morphisms (Ff_lcomp_unit ⊗ F) γ ;; 
   Ff_l_id_left_data F f')%mor_disp =
(Ff_l_id_left_data F f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms F
                            γ)%mor_disp

  
C: category
F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp ((Ff_lcomp_unit ⊗ F) f) (F f'))
     (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms (Ff_lcomp_unit ⊗ F) γ ;; 
      Ff_l_id_left_data F f')%mor_disp) =
pr1
  (Ff_l_id_left_data F f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                              F γ)%mor_disp

  
C: category
F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp ((Ff_lcomp_unit ⊗ F) f) (F f'))
     (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms (Ff_lcomp_unit ⊗ F) γ ;; 
      Ff_l_id_left_data F f')%mor_disp) = ?b
C: category
F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
?b =
pr1
  (Ff_l_id_left_data F f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                              F γ)%mor_disp

F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms (Ff_lcomp_unit ⊗ F) γ ;; 
   Ff_l_id_left_data F f')%mor_disp =
pr1
  (Ff_l_id_left_data F f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                              F γ)%mor_disp

  
C: category
F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms (Ff_lcomp_unit ⊗ F) γ ;; 
   Ff_l_id_left_data F f')%mor_disp = ?b
C: category
F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
?b =
pr1
  (Ff_l_id_left_data F f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                              F γ)%mor_disp
 
C: category
F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms (Ff_lcomp_unit ⊗ F) γ) =
pr1
  (Ff_l_id_left_data F f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                              F γ)%mor_disp

  
C: category
F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr1
  (Ff_l_id_left_data F f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                              F γ)%mor_disp =
pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms (Ff_lcomp_unit ⊗ F) γ)

  apply id_left.
Qed.

Definition Ff_l_id_left (F : Ff C) : (Ff_lcomp_unit ⊗ F) --> F :=
    (_,, Ff_l_id_left_axioms F).


C: category
F: Ff C
section_nat_trans_disp_data F (Ff_lcomp_unit ⊗ F)


C: category
F: Ff C
section_nat_trans_disp_data F (Ff_lcomp_unit ⊗ F)

  
C: category
F: Ff C
f: arrow C
F f -->[ identity f] (Ff_lcomp_unit ⊗ F) f

  
C: category
F: Ff C
f: arrow C
pr12 (F f) · identity (pr1 (F f)) =
pr11 (identity f) · pr12 ((Ff_lcomp_unit ⊗ F) f)
× pr122 (F f) · pr21 (identity f) =
  identity (pr1 (F f)) · pr122 ((Ff_lcomp_unit ⊗ F) f)

  abstract (
    split; (
      etrans; [apply id_right|];
      apply pathsinv0;
      etrans; [apply id_left|]
    ); [apply id_right|reflexivity]
  ).
Defined.

F: Ff C
section_nat_trans_disp_axioms
  (Ff_l_id_left_rev_data F)

F: Ff C
section_nat_trans_disp_axioms
  (Ff_l_id_left_rev_data F)

F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (F f) ((Ff_lcomp_unit ⊗ F) f'))
  (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
  (section_disp_on_morphisms F γ ;; Ff_l_id_left_rev_data
                                      F f')%mor_disp =
(Ff_l_id_left_rev_data F f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                (Ff_lcomp_unit ⊗ F) γ)%mor_disp

  
C: category
F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (F f) ((Ff_lcomp_unit ⊗ F) f'))
     (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms F γ ;; Ff_l_id_left_rev_data
                                         F f')%mor_disp) =
pr1
  (Ff_l_id_left_rev_data F f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                  (Ff_lcomp_unit ⊗ F)
                                  γ)%mor_disp

  
C: category
F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (F f) ((Ff_lcomp_unit ⊗ F) f'))
     (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms F γ ;; Ff_l_id_left_rev_data
                                         F f')%mor_disp) =
?b
C: category
F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
?b =
pr1
  (Ff_l_id_left_rev_data F f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                  (Ff_lcomp_unit ⊗ F)
                                  γ)%mor_disp
 
C: category
F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms F γ ;; Ff_l_id_left_rev_data
                                      F f')%mor_disp =
pr1
  (Ff_l_id_left_rev_data F f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                  (Ff_lcomp_unit ⊗ F)
                                  γ)%mor_disp

  
C: category
F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms F γ ;; Ff_l_id_left_rev_data
                                      F f')%mor_disp =
?b
C: category
F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
?b =
pr1
  (Ff_l_id_left_rev_data F f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                  (Ff_lcomp_unit ⊗ F)
                                  γ)%mor_disp
 
C: category
F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms F γ) =
pr1
  (Ff_l_id_left_rev_data F f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                  (Ff_lcomp_unit ⊗ F)
                                  γ)%mor_disp

  
C: category
F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr1
  (Ff_l_id_left_rev_data F f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                  (Ff_lcomp_unit ⊗ F)
                                  γ)%mor_disp =
pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms F γ)

  apply id_left.
Qed.

Definition Ff_l_id_left_rev (F : Ff C) : F --> (Ff_lcomp_unit ⊗ F) :=
    (_,, Ff_l_id_left_rev_axioms F).


C: category
F: Ff C
section_nat_trans_disp_data (F ⊗ Ff_lcomp_unit) F


C: category
F: Ff C
section_nat_trans_disp_data (F ⊗ Ff_lcomp_unit) F

  
C: category
F: Ff C
f: arrow C
(F ⊗ Ff_lcomp_unit) f -->[ identity f] F f

  
C: category
F: Ff C
f: arrow C
pr12 ((F ⊗ Ff_lcomp_unit) f)
· identity (pr1 ((F ⊗ Ff_lcomp_unit) f)) =
pr11 (identity f) · pr12 (F f)
× pr122 ((F ⊗ Ff_lcomp_unit) f) · pr21 (identity f) =
  identity (pr1 ((F ⊗ Ff_lcomp_unit) f)) · pr122 (F f)

  abstract (
    split; (
      etrans; [apply id_right|];
      apply pathsinv0;
      etrans; [apply id_left|]
    ); [apply pathsinv0; apply id_left|reflexivity]
  ).
Defined.

F: Ff C
section_nat_trans_disp_axioms (Ff_l_id_right_data F)

F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
transportf (mor_disp ((F ⊗ Ff_lcomp_unit) f) (F f'))
  (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
  (section_disp_on_morphisms (F ⊗ Ff_lcomp_unit) γ ;; 
   Ff_l_id_right_data F f')%mor_disp =
(Ff_l_id_right_data F f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms F
                             γ)%mor_disp

f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp ((F ⊗ Ff_lcomp_unit) f) (F f'))
     (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms (F ⊗ Ff_lcomp_unit) γ ;; 
      Ff_l_id_right_data F f')%mor_disp) =
pr1
  (Ff_l_id_right_data F f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                               F γ)%mor_disp

f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp ((F ⊗ Ff_lcomp_unit) f) (F f'))
     (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms (F ⊗ Ff_lcomp_unit) γ ;; 
      Ff_l_id_right_data F f')%mor_disp) = ?b
C: category
F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
?b =
pr1
  (Ff_l_id_right_data F f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                               F γ)%mor_disp

F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C

  (section_disp_on_morphisms (F ⊗ Ff_lcomp_unit) γ ;; 
   Ff_l_id_right_data F f')%mor_disp =
pr1
  (Ff_l_id_right_data F f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                               F γ)%mor_disp


  (* simpl makes it very slow *)
  (* simpl. *)
  
C: category
F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms (F ⊗ Ff_lcomp_unit) γ ;; 
   Ff_l_id_right_data F f')%mor_disp = ?b
C: category
F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
?b =
pr1
  (Ff_l_id_right_data F f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                               F γ)%mor_disp
 
C: category
F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms (F ⊗ Ff_lcomp_unit) γ) =
pr1
  (Ff_l_id_right_data F f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                               F γ)%mor_disp

  
C: category
F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr1
  (Ff_l_id_right_data F f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                               F γ)%mor_disp =
pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms (F ⊗ Ff_lcomp_unit) γ)

  
C: category
F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr1
  (Ff_l_id_right_data F f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                               F γ)%mor_disp = ?b
C: category
F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
?b =
pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms (F ⊗ Ff_lcomp_unit) γ)
 
C: category
F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms F γ) =
pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms (F ⊗ Ff_lcomp_unit) γ)


  (* unfold three_mor11.
  cbn. *)

  use (section_disp_on_eq_morphisms F (γ := γ)); reflexivity.
Qed.

Definition Ff_l_id_right (F : Ff C) : (F ⊗ Ff_lcomp_unit) --> F :=
    (_,, Ff_l_id_right_axioms F).


C: category
F: Ff C
section_nat_trans_disp_data F (F ⊗ Ff_lcomp_unit)


C: category
F: Ff C
section_nat_trans_disp_data F (F ⊗ Ff_lcomp_unit)

  
C: category
F: Ff C
f: arrow C
F f -->[ identity f] (F ⊗ Ff_lcomp_unit) f

  
C: category
F: Ff C
f: arrow C
pr12 (F f) · identity (pr1 (F f)) =
pr11 (identity f) · pr12 ((F ⊗ Ff_lcomp_unit) f)
× pr122 (F f) · pr21 (identity f) =
  identity (pr1 (F f)) · pr122 ((F ⊗ Ff_lcomp_unit) f)

  abstract (
    split; (
      etrans; [apply id_right|];
      apply pathsinv0;
      etrans; [apply id_left|]
    ); [apply id_left|reflexivity]
  ).
Defined.


C: category
F: Ff C
section_nat_trans_disp_axioms
  (Ff_l_id_right_rev_data F)


C: category
F: Ff C
section_nat_trans_disp_axioms
  (Ff_l_id_right_rev_data F)

  
C: category
F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (F f) ((F ⊗ Ff_lcomp_unit) f'))
  (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
  (section_disp_on_morphisms F γ ;; Ff_l_id_right_rev_data
                                      F f')%mor_disp =
(Ff_l_id_right_rev_data F f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                 (F ⊗ Ff_lcomp_unit) γ)%mor_disp

  
C: category
F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (F f) ((F ⊗ Ff_lcomp_unit) f'))
     (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms F γ ;; Ff_l_id_right_rev_data
                                         F f')%mor_disp) =
pr1
  (Ff_l_id_right_rev_data F f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                   (F ⊗ Ff_lcomp_unit)
                                   γ)%mor_disp


  
C: category
F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (F f) ((F ⊗ Ff_lcomp_unit) f'))
     (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms F γ ;; Ff_l_id_right_rev_data
                                         F f')%mor_disp) =
?b
C: category
F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
?b =
pr1
  (Ff_l_id_right_rev_data F f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                   (F ⊗ Ff_lcomp_unit)
                                   γ)%mor_disp
 
C: category
F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms F γ ;; Ff_l_id_right_rev_data
                                      F f')%mor_disp =
pr1
  (Ff_l_id_right_rev_data F f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                   (F ⊗ Ff_lcomp_unit)
                                   γ)%mor_disp


  (* simpl makes it very slow *)
  (* simpl. *)
  
C: category
F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms F γ ;; Ff_l_id_right_rev_data
                                      F f')%mor_disp =
?b
C: category
F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
?b =
pr1
  (Ff_l_id_right_rev_data F f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                   (F ⊗ Ff_lcomp_unit)
                                   γ)%mor_disp
 
C: category
F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms F γ) =
pr1
  (Ff_l_id_right_rev_data F f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                   (F ⊗ Ff_lcomp_unit)
                                   γ)%mor_disp

  
C: category
F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr1
  (Ff_l_id_right_rev_data F f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                   (F ⊗ Ff_lcomp_unit)
                                   γ)%mor_disp =
pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms F γ)

  
C: category
F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr1
  (Ff_l_id_right_rev_data F f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                   (F ⊗ Ff_lcomp_unit)
                                   γ)%mor_disp = ?b
C: category
F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
?b = pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms F γ)
 
C: category
F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms (F ⊗ Ff_lcomp_unit) γ) =
pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms F γ)


  use section_disp_on_eq_morphisms; reflexivity.
Qed.

Definition Ff_l_id_right_rev (F : Ff C) : F --> (F ⊗ Ff_lcomp_unit) :=
    (_,, Ff_l_id_right_rev_axioms F).


C: category
G, G': Ff C
τ: section_nat_trans_disp G G'
F: Ff C
section_nat_trans_disp_data (G ⊗ F) (G' ⊗ F)


C: category
G, G': Ff C
τ: section_nat_trans_disp G G'
F: Ff C
section_nat_trans_disp_data (G ⊗ F) (G' ⊗ F)

  
C: category
G, G': Ff C
τ: section_nat_trans_disp G G'
F: Ff C
f: arrow C
(G ⊗ F) f -->[ identity f] (G' ⊗ F) f

  (* cbn. *)
  
C: category
G, G': Ff C
τ: section_nat_trans_disp G G'
F: Ff C
f: arrow C
τρf:= τ (fact_R F f): G (fact_R F f) -->[ identity (fact_R F f)] G' (fact_R F f)
(G ⊗ F) f -->[ identity f] (G' ⊗ F) f

  
C: category
G, G': Ff C
τ: section_nat_trans_disp G G'
F: Ff C
f: arrow C
mor: C ⟦ pr1 (G (fact_R F f)), pr1 (G' (fact_R F f)) ⟧
comm1: pr12 (G (fact_R F f)) · mor =
pr11 (identity (fact_R F f))
· pr12 (G' (fact_R F f))
comm2: pr122 (G (fact_R F f))
· pr21 (identity (fact_R F f)) =
mor · pr122 (G' (fact_R F f))
(G ⊗ F) f -->[ identity f] (G' ⊗ F) f

  
C: category
G, G': Ff C
τ: section_nat_trans_disp G G'
F: Ff C
f: arrow C
mor: C ⟦ pr1 (G (fact_R F f)), pr1 (G' (fact_R F f)) ⟧
comm1: pr12 (G (fact_R F f)) · mor =
pr11 (identity (fact_R F f))
· pr12 (G' (fact_R F f))
comm2: pr122 (G (fact_R F f))
· pr21 (identity (fact_R F f)) =
mor · pr122 (G' (fact_R F f))
pr12 ((G ⊗ F) f) · mor =
pr11 (identity f) · pr12 ((G' ⊗ F) f)
× pr122 ((G ⊗ F) f) · pr21 (identity f) =
  mor · pr122 ((G' ⊗ F) f)

  abstract (
    split; [
      etrans; [apply assoc'|];
      apply pathsinv0;
      etrans; [apply id_left|];
      apply cancel_precomposition;
      apply pathsinv0;
      etrans; [exact comm1|];
      apply id_left
    | etrans; [apply id_right|];
      apply pathsinv0;
      etrans; [exact (pathsinv0 comm2)|];
      apply id_right
    ]
  ).
Defined.


C: category
G, G': section_disp (three_disp C)
τ: section_nat_trans_disp G G'
F: Ff C
section_nat_trans_disp_axioms
  (Ff_l_rightwhisker_data τ F)


C: category
G, G': section_disp (three_disp C)
τ: section_nat_trans_disp G G'
F: Ff C
section_nat_trans_disp_axioms
  (Ff_l_rightwhisker_data τ F)

  
C: category
G, G': section_disp (three_disp C)
τ: section_nat_trans_disp G G'
F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
transportf (mor_disp ((G ⊗ F) f) ((G' ⊗ F) f'))
  (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
  (section_disp_on_morphisms (G ⊗ F) γ ;; Ff_l_rightwhisker_data
                                            τ F f')%mor_disp =
(Ff_l_rightwhisker_data τ F f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                   (G' ⊗ F) γ)%mor_disp

  
C: category
G, G': section_disp (three_disp C)
τ: section_nat_trans_disp G G'
F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr1
  (transportf (mor_disp ((G ⊗ F) f) ((G' ⊗ F) f'))
     (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms (G ⊗ F) γ ;; Ff_l_rightwhisker_data
                                               τ F f')%mor_disp) =
pr1
  (Ff_l_rightwhisker_data τ F f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                     (G' ⊗ F) γ)%mor_disp


  
C: category
G, G': section_disp (three_disp C)
τ: section_nat_trans_disp G G'
F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr1
  (transportf (mor_disp ((G ⊗ F) f) ((G' ⊗ F) f'))
     (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms (G ⊗ F) γ ;; Ff_l_rightwhisker_data
                                               τ F f')%mor_disp) =
?b
C: category
G, G': section_disp (three_disp C)
τ: section_nat_trans_disp G G'
F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
?b =
pr1
  (Ff_l_rightwhisker_data τ F f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                     (G' ⊗ F) γ)%mor_disp
 
C: category
G, G': section_disp (three_disp C)
τ: section_nat_trans_disp G G'
F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms (G ⊗ F) γ ;; Ff_l_rightwhisker_data
                                            τ F f')%mor_disp =
pr1
  (Ff_l_rightwhisker_data τ F f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                     (G' ⊗ F) γ)%mor_disp


  
C: category
G, G': section_disp (three_disp C)
τ: section_nat_trans_disp_data G G'
τax: section_nat_trans_disp_axioms τ
F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms (G ⊗ F) γ ;; Ff_l_rightwhisker_data
                                            (τ,, τax)
                                            F f')%mor_disp =
pr1
  (Ff_l_rightwhisker_data (τ,, τax) F f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                             (G' ⊗ F)
                                             γ)%mor_disp

  
C: category
G, G': section_disp (three_disp C)
τ: section_nat_trans_disp_data G G'
τax: section_nat_trans_disp_axioms τ
F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
τcommf:= base_paths
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (G (fact_R F f))
        (G' (fact_R F f')))
     (id_right (# (fact_R F) γ) @
      ! id_left (# (fact_R F) γ))
     (section_disp_on_morphisms G
        ((# (fact_R F))%cat γ) ;; 
      τ (fact_R F f'))%mor_disp)
  (τ (fact_R F f) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                       G'
                       ((# (fact_R F))%cat γ))%mor_disp
  (τax (fact_R F f) (fact_R F f')
     (# (fact_R F) γ)): pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (G (fact_R F f))
        (G' (fact_R F f')))
     (id_right (# (fact_R F) γ) @
      ! id_left (# (fact_R F) γ))
     (section_disp_on_morphisms G
        ((# (fact_R F))%cat γ) ;; 
      τ (fact_R F f'))%mor_disp) =
pr1
  (τ (fact_R F f) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                       G'
                       ((# (fact_R F))%cat γ))%mor_disp
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms (G ⊗ F) γ ;; Ff_l_rightwhisker_data
                                            (τ,, τax)
                                            F f')%mor_disp =
pr1
  (Ff_l_rightwhisker_data (τ,, τax) F f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                             (G' ⊗ F)
                                             γ)%mor_disp

  
C: category
G, G': section_disp (three_disp C)
τ: section_nat_trans_disp_data G G'
τax: section_nat_trans_disp_axioms τ
F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
τcommf:= base_paths
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (G (fact_R F f))
        (G' (fact_R F f')))
     (id_right (# (fact_R F) γ) @
      ! id_left (# (fact_R F) γ))
     (section_disp_on_morphisms G
        ((# (fact_R F))%cat γ) ;; 
      τ (fact_R F f'))%mor_disp)
  (τ (fact_R F f) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                       G'
                       ((# (fact_R F))%cat γ))%mor_disp
  (τax (fact_R F f) (fact_R F f')
     (# (fact_R F) γ)): pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (G (fact_R F f))
        (G' (fact_R F f')))
     (id_right (# (fact_R F) γ) @
      ! id_left (# (fact_R F) γ))
     (section_disp_on_morphisms G
        ((# (fact_R F))%cat γ) ;; 
      τ (fact_R F f'))%mor_disp) =
pr1
  (τ (fact_R F f) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                       G'
                       ((# (fact_R F))%cat γ))%mor_disp
pr1
  (Ff_l_rightwhisker_data (τ,, τax) F f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                             (G' ⊗ F)
                                             γ)%mor_disp =
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms (G ⊗ F) γ ;; Ff_l_rightwhisker_data
                                            (τ,, τax)
                                            F f')%mor_disp

  
C: category
G, G': section_disp (three_disp C)
τ: section_nat_trans_disp_data G G'
τax: section_nat_trans_disp_axioms τ
F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
τcommf:= base_paths
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (G (fact_R F f))
        (G' (fact_R F f')))
     (id_right (# (fact_R F) γ) @
      ! id_left (# (fact_R F) γ))
     (section_disp_on_morphisms G
        ((# (fact_R F))%cat γ) ;; 
      τ (fact_R F f'))%mor_disp)
  (τ (fact_R F f) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                       G'
                       ((# (fact_R F))%cat γ))%mor_disp
  (τax (fact_R F f) (fact_R F f')
     (# (fact_R F) γ)): pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (G (fact_R F f))
        (G' (fact_R F f')))
     (id_right (# (fact_R F) γ) @
      ! id_left (# (fact_R F) γ))
     (section_disp_on_morphisms G
        ((# (fact_R F))%cat γ) ;; 
      τ (fact_R F f'))%mor_disp) =
pr1
  (τ (fact_R F f) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                       G'
                       ((# (fact_R F))%cat γ))%mor_disp
pr1
  (Ff_l_rightwhisker_data (τ,, τax) F f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                             (G' ⊗ F)
                                             γ)%mor_disp =
?b
C: category
G, G': section_disp (three_disp C)
τ: section_nat_trans_disp_data G G'
τax: section_nat_trans_disp_axioms τ
F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
τcommf:= base_paths
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (G (fact_R F f))
        (G' (fact_R F f')))
     (id_right (# (fact_R F) γ) @
      ! id_left (# (fact_R F) γ))
     (section_disp_on_morphisms G
        ((# (fact_R F))%cat γ) ;; 
      τ (fact_R F f'))%mor_disp)
  (τ (fact_R F f) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                       G'
                       ((# (fact_R F))%cat γ))%mor_disp
  (τax (fact_R F f) (fact_R F f')
     (# (fact_R F) γ)): pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (G (fact_R F f))
        (G' (fact_R F f')))
     (id_right (# (fact_R F) γ) @
      ! id_left (# (fact_R F) γ))
     (section_disp_on_morphisms G
        ((# (fact_R F))%cat γ) ;; 
      τ (fact_R F f'))%mor_disp) =
pr1
  (τ (fact_R F f) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                       G'
                       ((# (fact_R F))%cat γ))%mor_disp
?b =
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms (G ⊗ F) γ ;; 
   Ff_l_rightwhisker_data 
     (τ,, τax) F f')%mor_disp

                                            (τ,, τax)

C: category
G, G': section_disp (three_disp C)
τ: section_nat_trans_disp_data G G'
τax: section_nat_trans_disp_axioms τ
F: Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
τcommf:= base_paths
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (G (fact_R F f))
        (G' (fact_R F f')))
     (id_right (# (fact_R F) γ) @
      ! id_left (# (fact_R F) γ))
     (section_disp_on_morphisms G
        ((# (fact_R F))%cat γ) ;; 
      τ (fact_R F f'))%mor_disp)
  (τ (fact_R F f) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                       G'
                       ((# (fact_R F))%cat γ))%mor_disp
  (τax (fact_R F f) (fact_R F f')
     (# (fact_R F) γ)): pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (G (fact_R F f))
        (G' (fact_R F f')))
     (id_right (# (fact_R F) γ) @
      ! id_left (# (fact_R F) γ))
     (section_disp_on_morphisms G
        ((# (fact_R F))%cat γ) ;; 
      τ (fact_R F f'))%mor_disp) =
pr1
  (τ (fact_R F f) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                       G'
                       ((# (fact_R F))%cat γ))%mor_disp
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms G ((# (fact_R F))%cat γ) ;; 
   τ (fact_R F f'))%mor_disp =
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms (G ⊗ F) γ ;; Ff_l_rightwhisker_data
                                            (τ,, τax)
                                            F f')%mor_disp

  reflexivity.
Qed.

Definition Ff_l_rightwhisker {G G'} (τ : G --> G') (F : Ff C) :
    (G ⊗ F) --> (G' ⊗ F) :=
  (_,, Ff_l_rightwhisker_axioms τ F).

Notation "τ ⊗post F" := (Ff_l_rightwhisker τ F) (at level 50).



C: category
G, F: Ff C
identity G ⊗post F = identity (G ⊗ F)


C: category
G, F: Ff C
identity G ⊗post F = identity (G ⊗ F)

  
C: category
G, F: Ff C
f: arrow C
(identity G ⊗post F) f = identity (G ⊗ F) f

  
C: category
G, F: Ff C
f: arrow C
pr1 ((identity G ⊗post F) f) =
pr1 (identity (G ⊗ F) f)

  reflexivity.
Qed.


C: category
G, G', G'': Ff C
τ: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ': Ff C ⟦ G', G'' ⟧
F: Ff C
τ · τ' ⊗post F = (τ ⊗post F) · (τ' ⊗post F)


C: category
G, G', G'': Ff C
τ: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ': Ff C ⟦ G', G'' ⟧
F: Ff C
τ · τ' ⊗post F = (τ ⊗post F) · (τ' ⊗post F)

  
C: category
G, G', G'': Ff C
τ: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ': Ff C ⟦ G', G'' ⟧
F: Ff C
f: arrow C
(τ · τ' ⊗post F) f = ((τ ⊗post F) · (τ' ⊗post F)) f

  
C: category
G, G', G'': Ff C
τ: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ': Ff C ⟦ G', G'' ⟧
F: Ff C
f: arrow C
pr1 ((τ · τ' ⊗post F) f) =
pr1 (((τ ⊗post F) · (τ' ⊗post F)) f)

  (* cbn makes it very slow *)
  (* cbn. *)

  
C: category
G, G', G'': Ff C
τ: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ': Ff C ⟦ G', G'' ⟧
F: Ff C
f: arrow C
pr1 ((τ · τ' ⊗post F) f) = ?b
C: category
G, G', G'': Ff C
τ: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ': Ff C ⟦ G', G'' ⟧
F: Ff C
f: arrow C
?b = pr1 (((τ ⊗post F) · (τ' ⊗post F)) f)
 
C: category
G, G', G'': Ff C
τ: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ': Ff C ⟦ G', G'' ⟧
F: Ff C
f: arrow C
pr1 (τ (fact_R F f) ;; τ' (fact_R F f))%mor_disp =
pr1 (((τ ⊗post F) · (τ' ⊗post F)) f)

  
C: category
G, G', G'': Ff C
τ: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ': Ff C ⟦ G', G'' ⟧
F: Ff C
f: arrow C
pr1 (((τ ⊗post F) · (τ' ⊗post F)) f) =
pr1 (τ (fact_R F f) ;; τ' (fact_R F f))%mor_disp

  
C: category
G, G', G'': Ff C
τ: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ': Ff C ⟦ G', G'' ⟧
F: Ff C
f: arrow C
pr1 (((τ ⊗post F) · (τ' ⊗post F)) f) = ?b
C: category
G, G', G'': Ff C
τ: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ': Ff C ⟦ G', G'' ⟧
F: Ff C
f: arrow C
?b = pr1 (τ (fact_R F f) ;; τ' (fact_R F f))%mor_disp
 
C: category
G, G', G'': Ff C
τ: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ': Ff C ⟦ G', G'' ⟧
F: Ff C
f: arrow C
pr1 ((τ ⊗post F) f ;; (τ' ⊗post F) f)%mor_disp =
pr1 (τ (fact_R F f) ;; τ' (fact_R F f))%mor_disp

  reflexivity.
Qed.


C: category
F: Ff C
G, G': section_disp (three_disp C)
τ: section_nat_trans_disp G G'
section_nat_trans_disp_data (F ⊗ G) (F ⊗ G')


C: category
F: Ff C
G, G': section_disp (three_disp C)
τ: section_nat_trans_disp G G'
section_nat_trans_disp_data (F ⊗ G) (F ⊗ G')

  
C: category
F: Ff C
G, G': section_disp (three_disp C)
τ: section_nat_trans_disp G G'
f: arrow C
(F ⊗ G) f -->[ identity f] (F ⊗ G') f


  (* destruct (τ f) as [τf [commτ1 commτ2]]. *)
  
C: category
F: Ff C
G, G': section_disp (three_disp C)
τ: section_nat_trans_disp G G'
f: arrow C
ρGf:= fact_R G f: arrow C
(F ⊗ G) f -->[ identity f] (F ⊗ G') f

  
C: category
F: Ff C
G, G': section_disp (three_disp C)
τ: section_nat_trans_disp G G'
f: arrow C
ρGf:= fact_R G f: arrow C
ρG'f:= fact_R G' f: arrow C
(F ⊗ G) f -->[ identity f] (F ⊗ G') f

  
C: category
F: Ff C
G, G': section_disp (three_disp C)
τ: section_nat_trans_disp G G'
f: arrow C
ρGf:= fact_R G f: arrow C
ρG'f:= fact_R G' f: arrow C
γρ:= three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τ f)
:
arrow C ⟦ ρGf, ρG'f ⟧: arrow C ⟦ ρGf, ρG'f ⟧
(F ⊗ G) f -->[ identity f] (F ⊗ G') f


  
C: category
F: Ff C
G, G': section_disp (three_disp C)
τ: section_nat_trans_disp G G'
f: arrow C
ρGf:= fact_R G f: arrow C
ρG'f:= fact_R G' f: arrow C
γρ:= three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τ f)
:
arrow C ⟦ ρGf, ρG'f ⟧: arrow C ⟦ ρGf, ρG'f ⟧
Fγρ:= section_disp_on_morphisms F γρ: F ρGf -->[ γρ] F ρG'f
(F ⊗ G) f -->[ identity f] (F ⊗ G') f

  
C: category
F: Ff C
G, G': section_disp (three_disp C)
τ: section_nat_trans_disp G G'
f: arrow C
ρGf:= fact_R G f: arrow C
ρG'f:= fact_R G' f: arrow C
γρ:= three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τ f)
:
arrow C ⟦ ρGf, ρG'f ⟧: arrow C ⟦ ρGf, ρG'f ⟧
Fγρ:= section_disp_on_morphisms F γρ: F ρGf -->[ γρ] F ρG'f
pr12 ((F ⊗ G) f) · pr1 Fγρ =
pr11 (identity f) · pr12 ((F ⊗ G') f)
× pr122 ((F ⊗ G) f) · pr21 (identity f) =
  pr1 Fγρ · pr122 ((F ⊗ G') f)

  
C: category
F: Ff C
G, G': section_disp (three_disp C)
τ: section_nat_trans_disp G G'
f: arrow C
ρGf:= fact_R G f: arrow C
ρG'f:= fact_R G' f: arrow C
γρ:= three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τ f)
:
arrow C ⟦ ρGf, ρG'f ⟧: arrow C ⟦ ρGf, ρG'f ⟧
Fγρ:= section_disp_on_morphisms F γρ: F ρGf -->[ γρ] F ρG'f
comm:= pr2 Fγρ: (λ f : C ⟦ pr1 (F ρGf), pr1 (F ρG'f) ⟧,
 pr12 (F ρGf) · f = pr11 γρ · pr12 (F ρG'f)
 × pr122 (F ρGf) · pr21 γρ = f · pr122 (F ρG'f))
  (pr1 Fγρ)
pr12 ((F ⊗ G) f) · pr1 Fγρ =
pr11 (identity f) · pr12 ((F ⊗ G') f)
× pr122 ((F ⊗ G) f) · pr21 (identity f) =
  pr1 Fγρ · pr122 ((F ⊗ G') f)

  
C: category
F: Ff C
G, G': section_disp (three_disp C)
τ: section_nat_trans_disp G G'
f: arrow C
ρGf:= fact_R G f: arrow C
ρG'f:= fact_R G' f: arrow C
γρ:= three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τ f)
:
arrow C ⟦ ρGf, ρG'f ⟧: arrow C ⟦ ρGf, ρG'f ⟧
Fγρ:= section_disp_on_morphisms F γρ: F ρGf -->[ γρ] F ρG'f
comm:= pr2 Fγρ: pr12 (F ρGf) · pr1 Fγρ =
three_mor11 (section_nat_trans_data τ f)
· pr12 (F ρG'f)
× pr122 (F ρGf)
  · three_mor22 (section_nat_trans_data τ f) =
  pr1 Fγρ · pr122 (F ρG'f)
pr12 ((F ⊗ G) f) · pr1 Fγρ =
pr11 (identity f) · pr12 ((F ⊗ G') f)
× pr122 ((F ⊗ G) f) · pr21 (identity f) =
  pr1 Fγρ · pr122 ((F ⊗ G') f)


  (* commutativity of diagram
       =======
     |         |
  λG |         | λG'
     v   τf    v
       ------>
     |         |
λFρG |         | λFρG'
     v   τρf   v
     □ ------>□
     |         |
ρFρG |         | ρFρG'
     v         v
       =======
    *)
  abstract (
    split; [
      etrans; [apply assoc'|];
      etrans; [apply maponpaths; exact (pr1 comm)|];
      etrans; [apply assoc|];
      apply pathsinv0;
      etrans; [apply assoc|];
      apply cancel_postcomposition;
      exact (pathsinv0 (pr12 (τ f)))|
      exact (pr2 comm)
    ]
  ).
Defined.


C: category
F: Ff C
G, G': section_disp (three_disp C)
τ: section_nat_trans_disp G G'
section_nat_trans_disp_axioms
  (Ff_l_leftwhisker_data F τ)


C: category
F: Ff C
G, G': section_disp (three_disp C)
τ: section_nat_trans_disp G G'
section_nat_trans_disp_axioms
  (Ff_l_leftwhisker_data F τ)

  
C: category
F: Ff C
G, G': section_disp (three_disp C)
τ: section_nat_trans_disp G G'
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
transportf (mor_disp ((F ⊗ G) f) ((F ⊗ G') f'))
  (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
  (section_disp_on_morphisms (F ⊗ G) γ ;; Ff_l_leftwhisker_data
                                            F τ f')%mor_disp =
(Ff_l_leftwhisker_data F τ f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                  (F ⊗ G') γ)%mor_disp

  
C: category
F: Ff C
G, G': section_disp (three_disp C)
τ: section_nat_trans_disp G G'
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr1
  (transportf (mor_disp ((F ⊗ G) f) ((F ⊗ G') f'))
     (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms (F ⊗ G) γ ;; Ff_l_leftwhisker_data
                                               F τ f')%mor_disp) =
pr1
  (Ff_l_leftwhisker_data F τ f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                    (F ⊗ G') γ)%mor_disp


  
C: category
F: Ff C
G, G': section_disp (three_disp C)
τ: section_nat_trans_disp G G'
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr1
  (transportf (mor_disp ((F ⊗ G) f) ((F ⊗ G') f'))
     (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms (F ⊗ G) γ ;; Ff_l_leftwhisker_data
                                               F τ f')%mor_disp) =
?b
C: category
F: Ff C
G, G': section_disp (three_disp C)
τ: section_nat_trans_disp G G'
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
?b =
pr1
  (Ff_l_leftwhisker_data F τ f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                    (F ⊗ G') γ)%mor_disp
 
C: category
F: Ff C
G, G': section_disp (three_disp C)
τ: section_nat_trans_disp G G'
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms (F ⊗ G) γ ;; Ff_l_leftwhisker_data
                                            F τ f')%mor_disp =
pr1
  (Ff_l_leftwhisker_data F τ f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                    (F ⊗ G') γ)%mor_disp

  (* simpl.
  unfold three_mor11.
  cbn. *)

  
C: category
F: Ff C
G, G': section_disp (three_disp C)

γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms (F ⊗ G) γ ;; Ff_l_leftwhisker_data
                                            F τ f')%mor_disp =

C: category
F: Ff C
G, G': section_disp (three_disp C)
τ: section_nat_trans_disp G G'
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
?b =

  (Ff_l_leftwhisker_data F τ f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                    (F ⊗ G') γ)%mor_disp
 
C: category
F: Ff C
G, G': section_disp (three_disp C)
τ: section_nat_trans_disp G G'
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms F
     (# (fact_R G) γ
      · three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τ f'))) =
pr1
  (Ff_l_leftwhisker_data F τ f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                    (F ⊗ G') γ)%mor_disp

  
C: category
F: Ff C
G, G': section_disp (three_disp C)
τ: section_nat_trans_disp G G'
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr1
  (Ff_l_leftwhisker_data F τ f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                    (F ⊗ G') γ)%mor_disp =
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms F
     (# (fact_R G) γ
      · three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τ f')))

  
C: category

G, G': section_disp (three_disp C)

                                    (F ⊗ G') γ)%mor_disp =

C: category
F: Ff C
G, G': section_disp (three_disp C)
τ: section_nat_trans_disp G G'
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
?b =

  (section_disp_on_morphisms F
     (# (fact_R G) γ
      · three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τ f')))
 
C: category
F: Ff C
G, G': section_disp (three_disp C)
τ: section_nat_trans_disp G G'
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms F
     (three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τ f)
      · # (fact_R G') γ)) =
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms F
     (# (fact_R G) γ
      · three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τ f')))


  (* destruct τ as [τ τax]. *)
  (* unfold section_nat_trans_disp_axioms in τax. *)
  
C: category
F: Ff C
G, G': section_disp (three_disp C)
τ: section_nat_trans_disp G G'
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
τcommf:= base_paths
  (transportf (mor_disp (G f) (G' f'))
     (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms G γ ;; τ f')%mor_disp)
  (τ f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms G' γ)%mor_disp
  (section_nt_disp_axioms_from_section_nt_disp
     τ f f' γ): pr1
  (transportf (mor_disp (G f) (G' f'))
     (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms G γ ;; τ f')%mor_disp) =
pr1
  (τ f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms G' γ)%mor_disp
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms F
     (three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τ f)
      · # (fact_R G') γ)) =
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms F
     (# (fact_R G) γ
      · three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τ f')))


  
C: category
F: Ff C
G, G': section_disp (three_disp C)
τ: section_nat_trans_disp G G'
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
τcommf:= base_paths
  (transportf (mor_disp (G f) (G' f'))
     (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms G γ ;; τ f')%mor_disp)
  (τ f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms G' γ)%mor_disp
  (section_nt_disp_axioms_from_section_nt_disp
     τ f f' γ): pr1
  (transportf (mor_disp (G f) (G' f'))
     (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms G γ ;; τ f')%mor_disp) =
pr1
  (τ f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms G' γ)%mor_disp
arrow_mor00
  (three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τ f)
   · # (fact_R G') γ) =
arrow_mor00
  (# (fact_R G) γ
   · three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τ f'))

  (transportf (mor_disp (G f) (G' f'))
     (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)

  (τ f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms G' γ)%mor_disp

     τ f f' γ): pr1
  (transportf (mor_disp (G f) (G' f'))
     (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms G γ ;; τ f')%mor_disp) =
pr1
  (τ f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms G' γ)%mor_disp
arrow_mor11
  (three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τ f)
   · # (fact_R G') γ) =
arrow_mor11
  (# (fact_R G) γ
   · three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τ f'))

   · # (fact_R G') γ) =

f, f': arrow C

  (transportf (mor_disp (G f) (G' f'))

C: category
F: Ff C
G, G': section_disp (three_disp C)
τ: section_nat_trans_disp G G'
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
τcommf:= base_paths
  (transportf (mor_disp (G f) (G' f'))
     (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms G γ ;; τ f')%mor_disp)
  (τ f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms G' γ)%mor_disp
  (section_nt_disp_axioms_from_section_nt_disp
     τ f f' γ): pr1
  (transportf (mor_disp (G f) (G' f'))
     (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms G γ ;; τ f')%mor_disp) =
pr1
  (τ f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms G' γ)%mor_disp
pr1
  (transportf (mor_disp (G f) (G' f'))
     (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms G γ ;; τ f')%mor_disp) =
?b
C: category
F: Ff C
G, G': section_disp (three_disp C)
τ: section_nat_trans_disp G G'
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
τcommf:= base_paths
  (transportf (mor_disp (G f) (G' f'))
     (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms G γ ;; τ f')%mor_disp)
  (τ f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms G' γ)%mor_disp
  (section_nt_disp_axioms_from_section_nt_disp
     τ f f' γ): pr1
  (transportf (mor_disp (G f) (G' f'))
     (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms G γ ;; τ f')%mor_disp) =
pr1
  (τ f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms G' γ)%mor_disp
?b =
arrow_mor00
  (# (fact_R G) γ
   · three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τ f'))
 
C: category
F: Ff C
G, G': section_disp (three_disp C)
τ: section_nat_trans_disp G G'
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧

  (transportf (mor_disp (G f) (G' f'))
     (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms G γ ;; τ f')%mor_disp)

     (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms G γ ;; τ f')%mor_disp) =

  (τ f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms G' γ)%mor_disp
pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms G γ ;; τ f')%mor_disp =
arrow_mor00
  (# (fact_R G) γ
   · three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τ f'))

    reflexivity.
  
C: category
F: Ff C
G, G': section_disp (three_disp C)
τ: section_nat_trans_disp G G'
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
τcommf:= base_paths
  (transportf (mor_disp (G f) (G' f'))
     (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms G γ ;; τ f')%mor_disp)

  (transportf (mor_disp (G f) (G' f'))
     (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms G γ ;; τ f')%mor_disp) =
pr1
  (τ f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms G' γ)%mor_disp
arrow_mor11
  (three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τ f)
   · # (fact_R G') γ) =
arrow_mor11

   · three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τ f'))

G, G': section_disp (three_disp C)
τ: section_nat_trans_disp G G'
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
τcommf:= base_paths
  (transportf (mor_disp (G f) (G' f'))
     (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms G γ ;; τ f')%mor_disp)
  (τ f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms G' γ)%mor_disp
  (section_nt_disp_axioms_from_section_nt_disp
     τ f f' γ): pr1

     (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)

C: category
F: Ff C
G, G': section_disp (three_disp C)
τ: section_nat_trans_disp G G'
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
τcommf:= base_paths
  (transportf (mor_disp (G f) (G' f'))
     (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms G γ ;; τ f')%mor_disp)
  (τ f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms G' γ)%mor_disp
  (section_nt_disp_axioms_from_section_nt_disp
     τ f f' γ): pr1
  (transportf (mor_disp (G f) (G' f'))
     (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms G γ ;; τ f')%mor_disp) =
pr1
  (τ f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms G' γ)%mor_disp
pr21 (# (fact_R G) γ) = pr21 (# (fact_R G') γ)

    reflexivity.
Qed.

Definition Ff_l_leftwhisker (F : Ff C) {G G'} (τ : G --> G') :
    (F ⊗ G) --> (F ⊗ G') :=
  (_,, Ff_l_leftwhisker_axioms F τ).

Notation "F ⊗pre τ" := (Ff_l_leftwhisker F τ) (at level 50).


C: category
F, G: Ff C
F ⊗pre identity G = identity (F ⊗ G)


C: category
F, G: Ff C
F ⊗pre identity G = identity (F ⊗ G)

  
C: category
F, G: Ff C
f: arrow C
(F ⊗pre identity G) f = identity (F ⊗ G) f

  
C: category
F, G: Ff C
f: arrow C
pr1 ((F ⊗pre identity G) f) = pr1 (identity (F ⊗ G) f)

  (* cbn makes it very slow *)
  (* cbn. *)
  
C: category
F, G: Ff C
f: arrow C
pr1 ((F ⊗pre identity G) f) = ?b
C: category
F, G: Ff C
f: arrow C
?b = pr1 (identity (F ⊗ G) f)
 
C: category
F, G: Ff C
f: arrow C
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms F (identity (fact_R G f))) =
pr1 (identity (F ⊗ G) f)

  
C: category
F, G: Ff C
f: arrow C
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms F (identity (fact_R G f))) =
?b
C: category
F, G: Ff C
f: arrow C
?b = pr1 (identity (F ⊗ G) f)
 
C: category
F, G: Ff C
f: arrow C
section_disp_on_morphisms F (identity (fact_R G f)) =
?t2
C: category
F, G: Ff C
f: arrow C
pr1 ?t2 = pr1 (identity (F ⊗ G) f)

          
C: category
F, G: Ff C
f: arrow C
pr1 (id_disp (pr1 F (fact_R G f))) =
pr1 (identity (F ⊗ G) f)

  reflexivity.
Qed.


C: category
F, G, G', G'': Ff C
τ: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ': Ff C ⟦ G', G'' ⟧
F ⊗pre τ · τ' = (F ⊗pre τ) · (F ⊗pre τ')


C: category
F, G, G', G'': Ff C
τ: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ': Ff C ⟦ G', G'' ⟧
F ⊗pre τ · τ' = (F ⊗pre τ) · (F ⊗pre τ')

  
C: category
F, G, G', G'': Ff C
τ: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ': Ff C ⟦ G', G'' ⟧
f: arrow C
(F ⊗pre τ · τ') f = ((F ⊗pre τ) · (F ⊗pre τ')) f

  
C: category
F, G, G', G'': Ff C
τ: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ': Ff C ⟦ G', G'' ⟧
f: arrow C
pr1 ((F ⊗pre τ · τ') f) =
pr1 (((F ⊗pre τ) · (F ⊗pre τ')) f)


  
C: category
F, G, G', G'': Ff C
τ: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ': Ff C ⟦ G', G'' ⟧
f: arrow C
pr1 (((F ⊗pre τ) · (F ⊗pre τ')) f) =
pr1 ((F ⊗pre τ · τ') f)

  
C: category
F, G, G', G'': Ff C
τ: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ': Ff C ⟦ G', G'' ⟧
f: arrow C
pr1 (((F ⊗pre τ) · (F ⊗pre τ')) f) = ?b
C: category
F, G, G', G'': Ff C
τ: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ': Ff C ⟦ G', G'' ⟧
f: arrow C
?b = pr1 ((F ⊗pre τ · τ') f)
 
C: category
F, G, G', G'': Ff C
τ: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ': Ff C ⟦ G', G'' ⟧
f: arrow C
pr1 ((F ⊗pre τ) f ;; (F ⊗pre τ') f)%mor_disp =
pr1 ((F ⊗pre τ · τ') f)


  (* cbn. *)
  
C: category
F, G, G', G'': Ff C
τ: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ': Ff C ⟦ G', G'' ⟧
f: arrow C
pr1 ((F ⊗pre τ) f ;; (F ⊗pre τ') f)%mor_disp = ?b
C: category
F, G, G', G'': Ff C
τ: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ': Ff C ⟦ G', G'' ⟧
f: arrow C
?b = pr1 ((F ⊗pre τ · τ') f)
 
C: category
F, G, G', G'': Ff C
τ: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ': Ff C ⟦ G', G'' ⟧
f: arrow C
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms F
     (three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τ f)
      · three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τ' f))) =
pr1 ((F ⊗pre τ · τ') f)


  
C: category
F, G, G', G'': Ff C
τ: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ': Ff C ⟦ G', G'' ⟧
f: arrow C
arrow_mor00
  (three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τ f)
   · three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τ' f)) =
arrow_mor00
  (three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans (τ · τ') f))
C: category
F, G, G', G'': Ff C
τ: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ': Ff C ⟦ G', G'' ⟧
f: arrow C
arrow_mor11
  (three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τ f)
   · three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τ' f)) =
arrow_mor11
  (three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans (τ · τ') f))

  
C: category
F, G, G', G'': Ff C
τ: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ': Ff C ⟦ G', G'' ⟧
f: arrow C
arrow_mor00
  (three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τ f)
   · three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τ' f)) =
arrow_mor00
  (three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans (τ · τ') f))
 
C: category
F, G, G', G'': Ff C
τ: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ': Ff C ⟦ G', G'' ⟧
f: arrow C
arrow_mor00
  (three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans (τ · τ') f)) =
arrow_mor00
  (three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τ f)
   · three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τ' f))

    
C: category
F, G, G', G'': Ff C
τ: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ': Ff C ⟦ G', G'' ⟧
f: arrow C
arrow_mor00
  (three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans (τ · τ') f)) =
?b
C: category
F, G, G', G'': Ff C
τ: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ': Ff C ⟦ G', G'' ⟧
f: arrow C
?b =
arrow_mor00
  (three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τ f)
   · three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τ' f))
 
C: category
F, G, G', G'': Ff C
τ: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ': Ff C ⟦ G', G'' ⟧
f: arrow C
pr1 (τ f ;; τ' f)%mor_disp =
arrow_mor00
  (three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τ f)
   · three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τ' f))

    reflexivity.
  
C: category
F, G, G', G'': Ff C
τ: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ': Ff C ⟦ G', G'' ⟧
f: arrow C
arrow_mor11
  (three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τ f)
   · three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τ' f)) =
arrow_mor11
  (three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans (τ · τ') f))
 apply id_left.
Qed.


C: category
F, F', F'': Ff C
section_nat_trans_disp_data (F ⊗ (F' ⊗ F''))
  (F ⊗ F' ⊗ F'')


C: category
F, F', F'': Ff C
section_nat_trans_disp_data (F ⊗ (F' ⊗ F''))
  (F ⊗ F' ⊗ F'')

  
C: category
F, F', F'': Ff C
f: arrow C
(F ⊗ (F' ⊗ F'')) f -->[ identity f] (F ⊗ F' ⊗ F'') f

  
C: category
F, F', F'': Ff C
f: arrow C
pr12 ((F ⊗ (F' ⊗ F'')) f)
· identity (pr1 ((F ⊗ (F' ⊗ F'')) f)) =
pr11 (identity f) · pr12 ((F ⊗ F' ⊗ F'') f)
× pr122 ((F ⊗ (F' ⊗ F'')) f) · pr21 (identity f) =
  identity (pr1 ((F ⊗ (F' ⊗ F'')) f))
  · pr122 ((F ⊗ F' ⊗ F'') f)

  abstract (
    split;
      (etrans; [apply id_right|];
       apply pathsinv0;
       etrans; [apply id_left|]);
          [apply assoc|reflexivity]
  ).
Defined.


C: category
F, F', F'': Ff C
section_nat_trans_disp_axioms
  (Ff_l_assoc_rev_data F F' F'')


C: category
F, F', F'': Ff C
section_nat_trans_disp_axioms
  (Ff_l_assoc_rev_data F F' F'')

  
C: category
F, F', F'': Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp ((F ⊗ (F' ⊗ F'')) f) ((F ⊗ F' ⊗ F'') f'))
  (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
  (section_disp_on_morphisms (F ⊗ (F' ⊗ F'')) γ ;; 
   Ff_l_assoc_rev_data F F' F'' f')%mor_disp =
(Ff_l_assoc_rev_data F F' F'' f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                     (F ⊗ F' ⊗ F'') γ)%mor_disp

  
C: category
F, F', F'': Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp ((F ⊗ (F' ⊗ F'')) f)
        ((F ⊗ F' ⊗ F'') f'))
     (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms (F ⊗ (F' ⊗ F'')) γ ;; 
      Ff_l_assoc_rev_data F F' F'' f')%mor_disp) =
pr1
  (Ff_l_assoc_rev_data F F' F'' f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                       (F ⊗ F' ⊗ F'')
                                       γ)%mor_disp

pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp ((F ⊗ (F' ⊗ F'')) f)
        ((F ⊗ F' ⊗ F'') f'))
     (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms (F ⊗ (F' ⊗ F'')) γ ;; 
      Ff_l_assoc_rev_data F F' F'' f')%mor_disp) = 
?b

  (Ff_l_assoc_rev_data F F' F'' f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms

C: category
F, F', F'': Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧

  (Ff_l_assoc_rev_data F F' F'' f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                       (F ⊗ F' ⊗ F'')
                                       γ)%mor_disp =

C: category

pr1
  (Ff_l_assoc_rev_data F F' F'' f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms

?b
C: category
F, F', F'': Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
?b =
pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms (F ⊗ (F' ⊗ F'')) γ)
 
C: category
F, F', F'': Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms (F ⊗ F' ⊗ F'') γ) =
pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms (F ⊗ (F' ⊗ F'')) γ)


  (* unfold three_mor11.
  simpl. *)

  use (section_disp_on_eq_morphisms F); reflexivity.
Qed.

Definition Ff_l_assoc_rev (F F' F'' : Ff C) :
    (F ⊗ (F' ⊗ F'')) --> ((F ⊗ F') ⊗ F'') :=
  (_,, Ff_l_assoc_rev_axioms F F' F'').



C: category
F, F', F'': Ff C
section_nat_trans_disp_data (F ⊗ F' ⊗ F'')
  (F ⊗ (F' ⊗ F''))


C: category
F, F', F'': Ff C
section_nat_trans_disp_data (F ⊗ F' ⊗ F'')
  (F ⊗ (F' ⊗ F''))

  
C: category
F, F', F'': Ff C
f: arrow C
(F ⊗ F' ⊗ F'') f -->[ identity f] (F ⊗ (F' ⊗ F'')) f

  
C: category
F, F', F'': Ff C
f: arrow C
pr12 ((F ⊗ F' ⊗ F'') f)
· identity (pr1 ((F ⊗ F' ⊗ F'') f)) =
pr11 (identity f) · pr12 ((F ⊗ (F' ⊗ F'')) f)
× pr122 ((F ⊗ F' ⊗ F'') f) · pr21 (identity f) =
  identity (pr1 ((F ⊗ F' ⊗ F'') f))
  · pr122 ((F ⊗ (F' ⊗ F'')) f)

  abstract (
    split;
      (etrans; [apply id_right|];
       apply pathsinv0;
       etrans; [apply id_left|]);
          [apply assoc'|reflexivity]
  ).
Defined.


C: category
F, F', F'': Ff C
section_nat_trans_disp_axioms
  (Ff_l_assoc_data F F' F'')


C: category
F, F', F'': Ff C
section_nat_trans_disp_axioms
  (Ff_l_assoc_data F F' F'')

  
C: category
F, F', F'': Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp ((F ⊗ F' ⊗ F'') f) ((F ⊗ (F' ⊗ F'')) f'))
  (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
  (section_disp_on_morphisms (F ⊗ F' ⊗ F'') γ ;; Ff_l_assoc_data
                                                 F F'
                                                 F''
                                                 f')%mor_disp =
(Ff_l_assoc_data F F' F'' f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                 (F ⊗ (F' ⊗ F'')) γ)%mor_disp

  
C: category
F, F', F'': Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp ((F ⊗ F' ⊗ F'') f)
        ((F ⊗ (F' ⊗ F'')) f'))
     (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms (F ⊗ F' ⊗ F'') γ ;; 
      Ff_l_assoc_data F F' F'' f')%mor_disp) =
pr1
  (Ff_l_assoc_data F F' F'' f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                   (F ⊗ (F' ⊗ F'')) γ)%mor_disp


  
C: category
F, F', F'': Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp ((F ⊗ F' ⊗ F'') f)
        ((F ⊗ (F' ⊗ F'')) f'))
     (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms (F ⊗ F' ⊗ F'') γ ;; 
      Ff_l_assoc_data F F' F'' f')%mor_disp) = ?b
C: category
F, F', F'': Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
?b =
pr1
  (Ff_l_assoc_data F F' F'' f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                   (F ⊗ (F' ⊗ F'')) γ)%mor_disp
 
C: category
F, F', F'': Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms (F ⊗ F' ⊗ F'') γ ;; Ff_l_assoc_data
                                                 F F'
                                                 F''
                                                 f')%mor_disp =
pr1
  (Ff_l_assoc_data F F' F'' f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                   (F ⊗ (F' ⊗ F'')) γ)%mor_disp

  (* cbn makes it very slow *)
  (* cbn. *)
  
C: category
F, F', F'': Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms (F ⊗ F' ⊗ F'') γ ;; Ff_l_assoc_data
                                                 F F'

                                                 f')%mor_disp =

F, F', F'': Ff C

  (Ff_l_assoc_data F F' F'' f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
