C: category
F, F', F'': Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms (F ⊗ F' ⊗ F'') γ) =
pr1
  (Ff_l_assoc_data F F' F'' f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                   (F ⊗ (F' ⊗ F'')) γ)%mor_disp

  
C: category
F, F', F'': Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr1
  (Ff_l_assoc_data F F' F'' f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                   (F ⊗ (F' ⊗ F'')) γ)%mor_disp =
pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms (F ⊗ F' ⊗ F'') γ)

  
C: category
F, F', F'': Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr1
  (Ff_l_assoc_data F F' F'' f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                   (F ⊗ (F' ⊗ F'')) γ)%mor_disp =
?b
C: category
F, F', F'': Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
?b = pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms (F ⊗ F' ⊗ F'') γ)
 
C: category
F, F', F'': Ff C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms (F ⊗ (F' ⊗ F'')) γ) =
pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms (F ⊗ F' ⊗ F'') γ)


  (* unfold three_mor11.
  simpl. *)
  use (section_disp_on_eq_morphisms F); reflexivity.
Qed.

Definition Ff_l_assoc (F F' F'' : Ff C) :
    ((F ⊗ F') ⊗ F'') --> (F ⊗ (F' ⊗ F'')) :=
  (_,, Ff_l_assoc_axioms F F' F'').


C: category
F, F', G, G': Ff C
τ: Ff C ⟦ F, F' ⟧
ρ: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
Ff C ⟦ F ⊗ G, F' ⊗ G' ⟧


C: category
F, F', G, G': Ff C
τ: Ff C ⟦ F, F' ⟧
ρ: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
Ff C ⟦ F ⊗ G, F' ⊗ G' ⟧

  exact ((τ ⊗post G) · (F' ⊗pre ρ)).
Defined.


C: category
F: Ff C
section_nat_trans_disp_data Ff_lcomp_unit F


C: category
F: Ff C
section_nat_trans_disp_data Ff_lcomp_unit F

  
C: category
F: Ff C
f: arrow C
Ff_lcomp_unit f -->[ identity f] F f

  
C: category
F: Ff C
f: arrow C
pr12 (Ff_lcomp_unit f) · three_mor01 (F f) =
pr11 (identity f) · pr12 (F f)
× pr122 (Ff_lcomp_unit f) · pr21 (identity f) =
  three_mor01 (F f) · pr122 (F f)

  abstract (
    split; [
      reflexivity|
      rewrite id_right;
      apply pathsinv0;
      exact (three_comp (fact_functor F f))
    ]
  ).
Defined.


C: category
F: Ff C
section_nat_trans_disp_axioms (Ff_l_point_data F)


C: category
F: Ff C
section_nat_trans_disp_axioms (Ff_l_point_data F)

  
C: category
F: Ff C
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (Ff_lcomp_unit f) (F g))
  (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
  (section_disp_on_morphisms Ff_lcomp_unit γ ;; Ff_l_point_data
                                                 F g)%mor_disp =
(Ff_l_point_data F f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms F γ)%mor_disp

  
C: category
F: Ff C
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
pr1
  (transportf (mor_disp (Ff_lcomp_unit f) (F g))
     (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms Ff_lcomp_unit γ ;; 
      Ff_l_point_data F g)%mor_disp) =
pr1
  (Ff_l_point_data F f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms F
                            γ)%mor_disp

  
C: category
F: Ff C
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
pr1
  (transportf (mor_disp (Ff_lcomp_unit f) (F g))
     (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms Ff_lcomp_unit γ ;; 
      Ff_l_point_data F g)%mor_disp) = ?b
C: category
F: Ff C
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
?b =
pr1
  (Ff_l_point_data F f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms F
                            γ)%mor_disp
 
C: category
F: Ff C
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms Ff_lcomp_unit γ ;; Ff_l_point_data
                                                 F g)%mor_disp =
pr1
  (Ff_l_point_data F f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms F
                            γ)%mor_disp

  exact (arrow_mor_comm (#(fact_L F) γ)).
Qed.

Definition Ff_l_point (F : Ff C) :
    Ff_lcomp_unit --> F :=
  (_,, Ff_l_point_axioms F).

End Ff_composition.


(* redefine notation *)
Notation "F ⊗ F'" := (Ff_lcomp F F').
Notation "F ⊗pre τ" := (Ff_l_leftwhisker F τ) (at level 50).
Notation "τ ⊗post F" := (Ff_l_rightwhisker τ F) (at level 50).
Notation "τ ⊗prod ρ" := (Ff_l_mor_comp τ ρ) (at level 50).

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Categories.

Section Ff_monoidal.

Context {C : category}.


C: category
tensor_data (Ff C)


C: category
tensor_data (Ff C)

  
C: category
Ff C → Ff C → Ff C
C: category
(λ F : Ff C → Ff C → Ff C,
 (∏ a b1 b2 : Ff C,
  Ff C ⟦ b1, b2 ⟧ → Ff C ⟦ F a b1, F a b2 ⟧)
 × (∏ b a1 a2 : Ff C,
    Ff C ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧ → Ff C ⟦ F a1 b, F a2 b ⟧)) ?pr1

  
C: category
Ff C → Ff C → Ff C
 exact (Ff_lcomp).
  
C: category
(λ F : Ff C → Ff C → Ff C,
 (∏ a b1 b2 : Ff C,
  Ff C ⟦ b1, b2 ⟧ → Ff C ⟦ F a b1, F a b2 ⟧)
 × (∏ b a1 a2 : Ff C,
    Ff C ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧ → Ff C ⟦ F a1 b, F a2 b ⟧))
  Ff_lcomp
 
C: category
∏ a b1 b2 : Ff C,
Ff C ⟦ b1, b2 ⟧ → Ff C ⟦ a ⊗ b1, a ⊗ b2 ⟧
C: category
∏ b a1 a2 : Ff C,
Ff C ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧ → Ff C ⟦ a1 ⊗ b, a2 ⊗ b ⟧

    
C: category
∏ a b1 b2 : Ff C,
Ff C ⟦ b1, b2 ⟧ → Ff C ⟦ a ⊗ b1, a ⊗ b2 ⟧
 exact (Ff_l_leftwhisker).
    
C: category
∏ b a1 a2 : Ff C,
Ff C ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧ → Ff C ⟦ a1 ⊗ b, a2 ⊗ b ⟧
 exact (λ b _ _ γ, Ff_l_rightwhisker γ b).
Defined.


C: category
monoidal_data (Ff C)


C: category
monoidal_data (Ff C)

  
C: category
tensor_data (Ff C)
C: category
Ff C
C: category
leftunitor_data ?T ?I
C: category
leftunitorinv_data ?T ?I
C: category
rightunitor_data ?T ?I
C: category
rightunitorinv_data ?T ?I
C: category
associator_data ?T
C: category
associatorinv_data ?T

  
C: category
tensor_data (Ff C)
 exact Ff_tensor_data.
  
C: category
Ff C
 exact Ff_lcomp_unit.
  
C: category
leftunitor_data Ff_tensor_data Ff_lcomp_unit
 exact Ff_l_id_left.
  
C: category
leftunitorinv_data Ff_tensor_data Ff_lcomp_unit
 exact Ff_l_id_left_rev.
  
C: category
rightunitor_data Ff_tensor_data Ff_lcomp_unit
 exact Ff_l_id_right.
  
C: category
rightunitorinv_data Ff_tensor_data Ff_lcomp_unit
 exact Ff_l_id_right_rev.
  
C: category
associator_data Ff_tensor_data
 exact Ff_l_assoc.
  
C: category
associatorinv_data Ff_tensor_data
 exact Ff_l_assoc_rev.
Defined.


C: category
monoidal_laws Ff_monoidal_data


C: category
monoidal_laws Ff_monoidal_data

  
C: category
WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_leftidax
  Ff_monoidal_data
C: category
WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_rightidax
  Ff_monoidal_data
C: category
WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_leftcompax
  Ff_monoidal_data
C: category
WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_rightcompax
  Ff_monoidal_data
C: category
WhiskeredBifunctors.functoronmorphisms_are_equal
  Ff_monoidal_data
C: category
leftunitor_nat
  (monoidal_leftunitordata Ff_monoidal_data)
C: category
x: Ff C
monoidal_leftunitordata Ff_monoidal_data x
· monoidal_leftunitorinvdata Ff_monoidal_data x =
identity
  (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
     Ff_monoidal_data (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal_data)
     x)
C: category
x: Ff C
monoidal_leftunitorinvdata Ff_monoidal_data x
· monoidal_leftunitordata Ff_monoidal_data x =
identity x
C: category
rightunitor_nat
  (monoidal_rightunitordata Ff_monoidal_data)
C: category
x: Ff C
monoidal_rightunitordata Ff_monoidal_data x
· monoidal_rightunitorinvdata Ff_monoidal_data x =
identity
  (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
     Ff_monoidal_data x
     (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal_data))
C: category
x: Ff C
monoidal_rightunitorinvdata Ff_monoidal_data x
· monoidal_rightunitordata Ff_monoidal_data x =
identity x
C: category
associator_nat_leftwhisker
  (monoidal_associatordata Ff_monoidal_data)
C: category
associator_nat_rightwhisker
  (monoidal_associatordata Ff_monoidal_data)
C: category
associator_nat_leftrightwhisker
  (monoidal_associatordata Ff_monoidal_data)
C: category
x, y, z: Ff C
monoidal_associatordata Ff_monoidal_data x y z
· monoidal_associatorinvdata Ff_monoidal_data x y z =
identity
  (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
     Ff_monoidal_data
     (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
        Ff_monoidal_data x y) z)
C: category
x, y, z: Ff C
monoidal_associatorinvdata Ff_monoidal_data x y z
· monoidal_associatordata Ff_monoidal_data x y z =
identity
  (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
     Ff_monoidal_data x
     (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
        Ff_monoidal_data y z))
C: category
triangle_identity
  (monoidal_leftunitordata Ff_monoidal_data)
  (monoidal_rightunitordata Ff_monoidal_data)
  (monoidal_associatordata Ff_monoidal_data)
C: category
pentagon_identity
  (monoidal_associatordata Ff_monoidal_data)

  
C: category
WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_leftidax
  Ff_monoidal_data
 
C: category
F, F': Ff C
WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
  Ff_monoidal_data F F' F' (identity F') =
identity
  (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
     Ff_monoidal_data F F')

    
C: category
F, F': Ff C
f: arrow C
pr1
  (pr1
     (WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
        Ff_monoidal_data F F' F' (identity F')) f) =
pr1
  (pr1
     (identity
        (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
           Ff_monoidal_data F F')) f)

    
C: category
F, F': Ff C
f: arrow C
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms F
     (three_mor_mor12
        (section_nat_trans_data (Ff_precategory_id F')
           f))) =
identity
  (three_ob1
     ((make_dirprod (three_ob1 (f,, F' f))
         (three_ob2 (f,, F' f)),,
       three_mor12 (f,, F' f)),,
      F
        (make_dirprod (three_ob1 (f,, F' f))
           (three_ob2 (f,, F' f)),,
         three_mor12 (f,, F' f))))

    
C: category
F, F': Ff C
f: arrow C
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms F
     (three_mor_mor12
        (section_nat_trans_data (Ff_precategory_id F')
           f))) = ?b
C: category
F, F': Ff C
f: arrow C
?b =
identity
  (three_ob1
     ((make_dirprod (three_ob1 (f,, F' f))
         (three_ob2 (f,, F' f)),,
       three_mor12 (f,, F' f)),,
      F
        (make_dirprod (three_ob1 (f,, F' f))
           (three_ob2 (f,, F' f)),,
         three_mor12 (f,, F' f))))
 
C: category
F, F': Ff C
f: arrow C
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms F
     (identity
        (make_dirprod (three_ob1 (f,, F' f))
           (three_ob2 (f,, F' f)),,
         three_mor12 (f,, F' f)))) =
identity
  (three_ob1
     ((make_dirprod (three_ob1 (f,, F' f))
         (three_ob2 (f,, F' f)),,
       three_mor12 (f,, F' f)),,
      F
        (make_dirprod (three_ob1 (f,, F' f))
           (three_ob2 (f,, F' f)),,
         three_mor12 (f,, F' f))))

    
C: category
F, F': Ff C
f: arrow C
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms F
     (identity
        (make_dirprod (three_ob1 (f,, F' f))
           (three_ob2 (f,, F' f)),,
         three_mor12 (f,, F' f)))) = ?b
C: category
F, F': Ff C
f: arrow C
?b =
identity
  (three_ob1
     ((make_dirprod (three_ob1 (f,, F' f))
         (three_ob2 (f,, F' f)),,
       three_mor12 (f,, F' f)),,
      F
        (make_dirprod (three_ob1 (f,, F' f))
           (three_ob2 (f,, F' f)),,
         three_mor12 (f,, F' f))))
 
C: category
F, F': Ff C
f: arrow C
section_disp_on_morphisms F
  (identity
     (make_dirprod (three_ob1 (f,, F' f))
        (three_ob2 (f,, F' f)),,
      three_mor12 (f,, F' f))) = ?t2
C: category
F, F': Ff C
f: arrow C
pr1 ?t2 =
identity
  (three_ob1
     ((make_dirprod (three_ob1 (f,, F' f))
         (three_ob2 (f,, F' f)),,
       three_mor12 (f,, F' f)),,
      F
        (make_dirprod (three_ob1 (f,, F' f))
           (three_ob2 (f,, F' f)),,
         three_mor12 (f,, F' f))))
 
C: category
F, F': Ff C
f: arrow C
pr1
  (id_disp
     (pr1 F
        (make_dirprod (three_ob1 (f,, F' f))
           (three_ob2 (f,, F' f)),,
         three_mor12 (f,, F' f)))) =
identity
  (three_ob1
     ((make_dirprod (three_ob1 (f,, F' f))
         (three_ob2 (f,, F' f)),,
       three_mor12 (f,, F' f)),,
      F
        (make_dirprod (three_ob1 (f,, F' f))
           (three_ob2 (f,, F' f)),,
         three_mor12 (f,, F' f))))

    reflexivity.
  
C: category
WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_rightidax
  Ff_monoidal_data
 
C: category
F, F': Ff C
WhiskeredBifunctors.rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
  Ff_monoidal_data F F' F' (identity F') =
identity
  (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
     Ff_monoidal_data F' F)

    
C: category
F, F': Ff C
f: arrow C
pr1
  (pr1
     (WhiskeredBifunctors.rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
        Ff_monoidal_data F F' F' (identity F')) f) =
pr1
  (pr1
     (identity
        (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
           Ff_monoidal_data F' F)) f)

    reflexivity.
  
C: category
WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_leftcompax
  Ff_monoidal_data
 
C: category
A, F, F', F'': Ff C
γ: Ff C ⟦ F, F' ⟧
γ': Ff C ⟦ F', F'' ⟧
WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
  Ff_monoidal_data A F F'' (γ · γ') =
WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
  Ff_monoidal_data A F F' γ
· WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
    Ff_monoidal_data A F' F'' γ'

    
C: category
A, F, F', F'': Ff C
γ: Ff C ⟦ F, F' ⟧
γ': Ff C ⟦ F', F'' ⟧
f: arrow C
pr1
  (pr1
     (WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
        Ff_monoidal_data A F F'' (γ · γ')) f) =
pr1
  (pr1
     (WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
        Ff_monoidal_data A F F' γ
      · WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
          Ff_monoidal_data A F' F'' γ') f)

    (* cbn. *)

A, F, F', F'': Ff C

pr1

     (WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
        Ff_monoidal_data A F F' γ
      · WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms

     (WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
        Ff_monoidal_data A F F'' (γ · γ')) f)

mor:= three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans γ' f)
:
arrow C ⟦ fact_R F' f, fact_R F'' f ⟧: arrow C ⟦ fact_R F' f, fact_R F'' f ⟧
pr1
  (WhiskeredBifunctors.rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
     Ff_monoidal_data F' A F γ f ;; WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                      Ff_monoidal_data

A, F, F', F'': Ff C
γ: Ff C ⟦ A, F ⟧
γ': Ff C ⟦ F', F'' ⟧
f: arrow C
mor:= three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans γ' f)
:
arrow C ⟦ fact_R F' f, fact_R F'' f ⟧: arrow C ⟦ fact_R F' f, fact_R F'' f ⟧
γnaturality:= section_nt_disp_axioms_from_section_nt_disp
  γ: section_nat_trans_disp_axioms γ
pr1
  (WhiskeredBifunctors.rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
     Ff_monoidal_data F' A F γ f ;; WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                      Ff_monoidal_data
                                      F F' F'' γ' f)%mor_disp =
pr1
  (WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
     Ff_monoidal_data A F' F'' γ' f ;; WhiskeredBifunctors.rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                         Ff_monoidal_data

C: category
A, F, F', F'': Ff C
γ: Ff C ⟦ A, F ⟧
γ': Ff C ⟦ F', F'' ⟧
f: arrow C
mor:= three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans γ' f)
:
arrow C ⟦ fact_R F' f, fact_R F'' f ⟧: arrow C ⟦ fact_R F' f, fact_R F'' f ⟧
γnaturality:= section_nt_disp_axioms_from_section_nt_disp
  γ: section_nat_trans_disp_axioms γ
γnatf:= γnaturality (fact_R F' f) (fact_R F'' f) mor: transportf
  (mor_disp (A (fact_R F' f))
     (F (fact_R F'' f)))
  (id_right mor @ ! id_left mor)
  (section_disp_on_morphisms A mor ;; 
   γ (fact_R F'' f))%mor_disp =
(γ (fact_R F' f) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                     F mor)%mor_disp
pr1
  (WhiskeredBifunctors.rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
     Ff_monoidal_data F' A F γ f ;; WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                      Ff_monoidal_data
                                      F F' F'' γ' f)%mor_disp =
pr1
  (WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
     Ff_monoidal_data A F' F'' γ' f ;; WhiskeredBifunctors.rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                         Ff_monoidal_data
                                         F'' A F γ f)%mor_disp

    
C: category
A, F, F', F'': Ff C
γ: Ff C ⟦ A, F ⟧
γ': Ff C ⟦ F', F'' ⟧
f: arrow C
mor:= three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans γ' f)
:
arrow C ⟦ fact_R F' f, fact_R F'' f ⟧: arrow C ⟦ fact_R F' f, fact_R F'' f ⟧
γnaturality:= section_nt_disp_axioms_from_section_nt_disp
  γ: section_nat_trans_disp_axioms γ
γnatf:= γnaturality (fact_R F' f) (fact_R F'' f) mor: transportf
  (mor_disp (A (fact_R F' f))
     (F (fact_R F'' f)))
  (id_right mor @ ! id_left mor)
  (section_disp_on_morphisms A mor ;; 
   γ (fact_R F'' f))%mor_disp =
(γ (fact_R F' f) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                     F mor)%mor_disp
γnatfb:= base_paths
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (A (fact_R F' f))
        (F (fact_R F'' f)))
     (id_right mor @ ! id_left mor)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms A mor ;; 
      γ (fact_R F'' f))%mor_disp)
  (γ (fact_R F' f) ;; 
   section_disp_on_morphisms F mor)%mor_disp
  γnatf: pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (A (fact_R F' f))
        (F (fact_R F'' f)))
     (id_right mor @ ! id_left mor)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms A mor ;; 
      γ (fact_R F'' f))%mor_disp) =
pr1
  (γ (fact_R F' f) ;; 
   section_disp_on_morphisms F mor)%mor_disp
pr1
  (WhiskeredBifunctors.rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
     Ff_monoidal_data F' A F γ f ;; WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                      Ff_monoidal_data
                                      F F' F'' γ' f)%mor_disp =
pr1
  (WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
     Ff_monoidal_data A F' F'' γ' f ;; WhiskeredBifunctors.rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                         Ff_monoidal_data
                                         F'' A F γ f)%mor_disp

pr1
  (γ (fact_R F' f) ;; 
   section_disp_on_morphisms F mor)%mor_disp
?b =
pr1
  (WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
     Ff_monoidal_data A F' F'' γ' f ;; 
   WhiskeredBifunctors.rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
     Ff_monoidal_data F'' A F γ f)%mor_disp
 
C: category
A, F, F', F'': Ff C
γ: Ff C ⟦ A, F ⟧
γ': Ff C ⟦ F', F'' ⟧
f: arrow C
mor:= three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans γ' f)
:
arrow C ⟦ fact_R F' f, fact_R F'' f ⟧: arrow C ⟦ fact_R F' f, fact_R F'' f ⟧
γnaturality:= section_nt_disp_axioms_from_section_nt_disp
  γ: section_nat_trans_disp_axioms γ
γnatf:= γnaturality (fact_R F' f) (fact_R F'' f) mor: transportf
  (mor_disp (A (fact_R F' f))
     (F (fact_R F'' f)))
  (id_right mor @ ! id_left mor)
  (section_disp_on_morphisms A mor ;; 
   γ (fact_R F'' f))%mor_disp =
(γ (fact_R F' f) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                     F mor)%mor_disp
γnatfb:= base_paths
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (A (fact_R F' f))
        (F (fact_R F'' f)))
     (id_right mor @ ! id_left mor)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms A mor ;; 
      γ (fact_R F'' f))%mor_disp)
  (γ (fact_R F' f) ;; 
   section_disp_on_morphisms F mor)%mor_disp
  γnatf: pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (A (fact_R F' f))
        (F (fact_R F'' f)))
     (id_right mor @ ! id_left mor)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms A mor ;; 
      γ (fact_R F'' f))%mor_disp) =
pr1
  (γ (fact_R F' f) ;; 
   section_disp_on_morphisms F mor)%mor_disp
pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (A (fact_R F' f)) (F (fact_R F'' f)))
     (id_right mor @ ! id_left mor)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms A mor ;; γ
                                           (fact_R F''
                                              f))%mor_disp) =
pr1
  (WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
     Ff_monoidal_data A F' F'' γ' f ;; WhiskeredBifunctors.rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                         Ff_monoidal_data
                                         F'' A F γ f)%mor_disp

    
C: category
A, F, F', F'': Ff C
γ: Ff C ⟦ A, F ⟧
γ': Ff C ⟦ F', F'' ⟧
f: arrow C
mor:= three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans γ' f)
:
arrow C ⟦ fact_R F' f, fact_R F'' f ⟧: arrow C ⟦ fact_R F' f, fact_R F'' f ⟧
γnaturality:= section_nt_disp_axioms_from_section_nt_disp
  γ: section_nat_trans_disp_axioms γ
γnatf:= γnaturality (fact_R F' f) (fact_R F'' f) mor: transportf
  (mor_disp (A (fact_R F' f))
     (F (fact_R F'' f)))
  (id_right mor @ ! id_left mor)
  (section_disp_on_morphisms A mor ;; 
   γ (fact_R F'' f))%mor_disp =
(γ (fact_R F' f) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                     F mor)%mor_disp

  (transportf

        (F (fact_R F'' f)))
     (id_right mor @ ! id_left mor)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms A mor ;; 
      γ (fact_R F'' f))%mor_disp)
  (γ (fact_R F' f) ;; 
   section_disp_on_morphisms F mor)%mor_disp
  γnatf: pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (A (fact_R F' f))
        (F (fact_R F'' f)))
     (id_right mor @ ! id_left mor)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms A mor ;; 
      γ (fact_R F'' f))%mor_disp) =
pr1
  (γ (fact_R F' f) ;; 
   section_disp_on_morphisms F mor)%mor_disp
pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (A (fact_R F' f)) (F (fact_R F'' f)))
     (id_right mor @ ! id_left mor)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms A mor ;; γ
                                           (fact_R F''
                                              f))%mor_disp) =
?b

A, F, F', F'': Ff C

:
arrow C ⟦ fact_R F' f, fact_R F'' f ⟧: arrow C ⟦ fact_R F' f, fact_R F'' f ⟧
γnaturality:= section_nt_disp_axioms_from_section_nt_disp
  γ: section_nat_trans_disp_axioms γ
γnatf:= γnaturality (fact_R F' f) (fact_R F'' f) mor: transportf
  (mor_disp (A (fact_R F' f))
     (F (fact_R F'' f)))
  (id_right mor @ ! id_left mor)
  (section_disp_on_morphisms A mor ;; 
   γ (fact_R F'' f))%mor_disp =
(γ (fact_R F' f) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                     F mor)%mor_disp
γnatfb:= base_paths
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (A (fact_R F' f))
        (F (fact_R F'' f)))
     (id_right mor @ ! id_left mor)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms A mor ;; 
      γ (fact_R F'' f))%mor_disp)
  (γ (fact_R F' f) ;;

  γnatf: pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (A (fact_R F' f))
        (F (fact_R F'' f)))
     (id_right mor @ ! id_left mor)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms A mor ;; 
      γ (fact_R F'' f))%mor_disp) =
pr1
  (γ (fact_R F' f) ;; 
   section_disp_on_morphisms F mor)%mor_disp
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms A mor ;; γ (fact_R F'' f))%mor_disp =
pr1
  (WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
     Ff_monoidal_data A F' F'' γ' f ;; WhiskeredBifunctors.rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                         Ff_monoidal_data
                                         F'' A F γ f)%mor_disp

    
C: category
A, F, F', F'': Ff C
γ: Ff C ⟦ A, F ⟧
γ': Ff C ⟦ F', F'' ⟧
f: arrow C
mor:= three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans γ' f)
:
arrow C ⟦ fact_R F' f, fact_R F'' f ⟧: arrow C ⟦ fact_R F' f, fact_R F'' f ⟧
γnaturality:= section_nt_disp_axioms_from_section_nt_disp
  γ: section_nat_trans_disp_axioms γ
γnatf:= γnaturality (fact_R F' f) (fact_R F'' f) mor: transportf
  (mor_disp (A (fact_R F' f))
     (F (fact_R F'' f)))
  (id_right mor @ ! id_left mor)
  (section_disp_on_morphisms A mor ;; 
   γ (fact_R F'' f))%mor_disp =
(γ (fact_R F' f) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                     F mor)%mor_disp
γnatfb:= base_paths
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (A (fact_R F' f))
        (F (fact_R F'' f)))
     (id_right mor @ ! id_left mor)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms A mor ;; 
      γ (fact_R F'' f))%mor_disp)
  (γ (fact_R F' f) ;; 
   section_disp_on_morphisms F mor)%mor_disp
  γnatf: pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (A (fact_R F' f))
        (F (fact_R F'' f)))
     (id_right mor @ ! id_left mor)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms A mor ;; 
      γ (fact_R F'' f))%mor_disp) =
pr1
  (γ (fact_R F' f) ;; 
   section_disp_on_morphisms F mor)%mor_disp
pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms A mor) =
pr1
  (WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
     Ff_monoidal_data A F' F'' γ' f)

    use (section_disp_on_eq_morphisms A); reflexivity.
  
C: category
leftunitor_nat
  (monoidal_leftunitordata Ff_monoidal_data)
 
C: category
F, F': Ff C
γ: Ff C ⟦ F, F' ⟧
WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
  Ff_monoidal_data (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal_data) F
  F' γ · monoidal_leftunitordata Ff_monoidal_data F' =
monoidal_leftunitordata Ff_monoidal_data F · γ

    
C: category
F, F': Ff C
γ: Ff C ⟦ F, F' ⟧
f: arrow C
pr1
  (pr1
     (WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
        Ff_monoidal_data
        (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal_data) F F' γ
      · monoidal_leftunitordata Ff_monoidal_data F') f) =
pr1
  (pr1
     (monoidal_leftunitordata Ff_monoidal_data F · γ)
     f)

    
C: category
F, F': Ff C
γ: Ff C ⟦ F, F' ⟧
f: arrow C
pr1
  (pr1
     (WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
        Ff_monoidal_data
        (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal_data) F F' γ
      · monoidal_leftunitordata Ff_monoidal_data F') f) =
?b
C: category
F, F': Ff C
γ: Ff C ⟦ F, F' ⟧
f: arrow C
?b =
pr1
  (pr1
     (monoidal_leftunitordata Ff_monoidal_data F · γ)
     f)
 
C: category
F, F': Ff C
γ: Ff C ⟦ F, F' ⟧
f: arrow C
pr1
  (WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
     Ff_monoidal_data (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal_data)
     F F' γ f ;; monoidal_leftunitordata
                   Ff_monoidal_data F' f)%mor_disp =
pr1
  (pr1
     (monoidal_leftunitordata Ff_monoidal_data F · γ)
     f)

    
C: category
F, F': Ff C
γ: Ff C ⟦ F, F' ⟧
f: arrow C
pr1
  (pr1
     (monoidal_leftunitordata Ff_monoidal_data F · γ)
     f) =
pr1
  (WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
     Ff_monoidal_data (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal_data)
     F F' γ f ;; monoidal_leftunitordata
                   Ff_monoidal_data F' f)%mor_disp

    
C: category
F, F': Ff C
γ: Ff C ⟦ F, F' ⟧
f: arrow C
pr1
  (pr1
     (monoidal_leftunitordata Ff_monoidal_data F · γ)
     f) = ?b
C: category
F, F': Ff C
γ: Ff C ⟦ F, F' ⟧
f: arrow C
?b =
pr1
  (WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
     Ff_monoidal_data (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal_data)
     F F' γ f ;; monoidal_leftunitordata
                   Ff_monoidal_data F' f)%mor_disp
 
C: category
F, F': Ff C
γ: Ff C ⟦ F, F' ⟧
f: arrow C
pr1
  (monoidal_leftunitordata Ff_monoidal_data F f ;; 
   γ f)%mor_disp =
pr1
  (WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
     Ff_monoidal_data (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal_data)
     F F' γ f ;; monoidal_leftunitordata
                   Ff_monoidal_data F' f)%mor_disp

    (* cbn. *)
    
C: category
F, F': Ff C
γ: Ff C ⟦ F, F' ⟧
f: arrow C
pr1
  (monoidal_leftunitordata Ff_monoidal_data F f ;; 
   γ f)%mor_disp = ?b
C: category
F, F': Ff C
γ: Ff C ⟦ F, F' ⟧
f: arrow C
?b =
pr1
  (WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
     Ff_monoidal_data (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal_data)
     F F' γ f ;; monoidal_leftunitordata
                   Ff_monoidal_data F' f)%mor_disp
 
C: category
F, F': Ff C
γ: Ff C ⟦ F, F' ⟧
f: arrow C
pr1 (γ f) =
pr1
  (WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
     Ff_monoidal_data (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal_data)
     F F' γ f ;; monoidal_leftunitordata
                   Ff_monoidal_data F' f)%mor_disp

    
C: category
F, F': Ff C
γ: Ff C ⟦ F, F' ⟧
f: arrow C
pr1
  (WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
     Ff_monoidal_data (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal_data)
     F F' γ f ;; monoidal_leftunitordata
                   Ff_monoidal_data F' f)%mor_disp =
pr1 (γ f)

    
C: category
F, F': Ff C
γ: Ff C ⟦ F, F' ⟧
f: arrow C
pr1
  (WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
     Ff_monoidal_data (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal_data)
     F F' γ f ;; monoidal_leftunitordata
                   Ff_monoidal_data F' f)%mor_disp =
?b
C: category
F, F': Ff C
γ: Ff C ⟦ F, F' ⟧
f: arrow C
?b = pr1 (γ f)
 
C: category
F, F': Ff C
γ: Ff C ⟦ F, F' ⟧
f: arrow C
pr1
  (WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
     Ff_monoidal_data (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal_data)
     F F' γ f) = pr1 (γ f)

    reflexivity.
  
C: category
x: Ff C
monoidal_leftunitordata Ff_monoidal_data x
· monoidal_leftunitorinvdata Ff_monoidal_data x =
identity
  (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
     Ff_monoidal_data (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal_data)
     x)
 
C: category
x: Ff C
f: arrow C
pr1
  (pr1
     (monoidal_leftunitordata Ff_monoidal_data x
      · monoidal_leftunitorinvdata Ff_monoidal_data x)
     f) =
pr1
  (pr1
     (identity
        (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
           Ff_monoidal_data
           (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal_data) x)) f)

    (* cbn. *)
    
C: category
x: Ff C
f: arrow C
pr1
  (pr1
     (monoidal_leftunitordata Ff_monoidal_data x
      · monoidal_leftunitorinvdata Ff_monoidal_data x)
     f) = ?b
C: category
x: Ff C
f: arrow C
?b =
pr1
  (pr1
     (identity
        (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
           Ff_monoidal_data
           (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal_data) x)) f)
 
C: category
x: Ff C
f: arrow C
pr1
  (monoidal_leftunitordata Ff_monoidal_data x f ;; 
   monoidal_leftunitorinvdata Ff_monoidal_data x f)%mor_disp =
pr1
  (pr1
     (identity
        (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
           Ff_monoidal_data
           (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal_data) x)) f)

    apply id_left.
  
C: category
x: Ff C
monoidal_leftunitorinvdata Ff_monoidal_data x
· monoidal_leftunitordata Ff_monoidal_data x =
identity x
 
C: category
x: Ff C
f: arrow C
pr1
  (pr1
     (monoidal_leftunitorinvdata Ff_monoidal_data x
      · monoidal_leftunitordata Ff_monoidal_data x) f) =
pr1 (pr1 (identity x) f)

    
C: category
x: Ff C
f: arrow C
pr1
  (pr1
     (monoidal_leftunitorinvdata Ff_monoidal_data x
      · monoidal_leftunitordata Ff_monoidal_data x) f) =
?b
C: category
x: Ff C
f: arrow C
?b = pr1 (pr1 (identity x) f)
 
C: category
x: Ff C
f: arrow C
pr1
  (monoidal_leftunitorinvdata Ff_monoidal_data x f ;; 
   monoidal_leftunitordata Ff_monoidal_data x f)%mor_disp =
pr1 (pr1 (identity x) f)

    apply id_left.

rightunitor_nat
  (monoidal_rightunitordata Ff_monoidal_data)

      · monoidal_rightunitorinvdata Ff_monoidal_data x)
     f) =

  Ff_monoidal_data F''
  (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
     Ff_monoidal_data A F)
  (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
     Ff_monoidal_data A F')
  (WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
     Ff_monoidal_data A F F' γ)
· monoidal_associatordata Ff_monoidal_data A F' F''

            (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
               Ff_monoidal_data F F') F'' f)%mor_disp =
pr1
  (pr1
     (monoidal_associatordata Ff_monoidal_data
        (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
           Ff_monoidal_data A F) F' F''
      · monoidal_associatordata Ff_monoidal_data A F
          (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
             Ff_monoidal_data F' F'')) f)

A, F, F', F'': Ff C
f: arrow C
pr1
  (WhiskeredBifunctors.rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
     Ff_monoidal_data F''
     (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
        Ff_monoidal_data

               Ff_monoidal_data F F') F'' f)%mor_disp =

A, F, F', F'': Ff C
f: arrow C
?b =

     Ff_monoidal_data F''

C: category
A, F, F', F'': Ff C
f: arrow C
pr1
  (monoidal_associatordata Ff_monoidal_data
     (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
        Ff_monoidal_data A F) F' F'' f ;; monoidal_associatordata
                                            Ff_monoidal_data
                                            A F
                                            (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
                                               Ff_monoidal_data
                                               F' F'')
                                            f)%mor_disp =
pr1
  (WhiskeredBifunctors.rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
     Ff_monoidal_data F''
     (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
        Ff_monoidal_data
        (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
           Ff_monoidal_data A F) F')
     (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
        Ff_monoidal_data A
        (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
           Ff_monoidal_data F F'))
     (monoidal_associatordata Ff_monoidal_data A F F')
     f)

    
C: category
A, F, F', F'': Ff C
f: arrow C
pr1
  (monoidal_associatordata Ff_monoidal_data
     (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
        Ff_monoidal_data A F) F' F'' f ;; monoidal_associatordata
                                            Ff_monoidal_data
                                            A F
                                            (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
                                               Ff_monoidal_data
                                               F' F'')
                                            f)%mor_disp =
?b
C: category
A, F, F', F'': Ff C
f: arrow C
?b =
pr1
  (WhiskeredBifunctors.rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
     Ff_monoidal_data F''
     (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
        Ff_monoidal_data
        (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
           Ff_monoidal_data A F) F')
     (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
        Ff_monoidal_data A
        (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
           Ff_monoidal_data F F'))
     (monoidal_associatordata Ff_monoidal_data A F F')
     f)
 
C: category
A, F, F', F'': Ff C
f: arrow C
pr1
  (monoidal_associatordata Ff_monoidal_data A F
     (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
        Ff_monoidal_data F' F'') f) =
pr1
  (WhiskeredBifunctors.rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
     Ff_monoidal_data F''
     (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
        Ff_monoidal_data
        (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
           Ff_monoidal_data A F) F')
     (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
        Ff_monoidal_data A
        (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
           Ff_monoidal_data F F'))
     (monoidal_associatordata Ff_monoidal_data A F F')
     f)

    reflexivity.
Qed.

Definition Ff_monoidal : monoidal (Ff C) :=
    (_,, Ff_monoidal_laws).

End Ff_monoidal.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monads.Monads.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.CategoriesOfMonoids.

Section Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS.

Context {C : category}.



C: category
F: Ff C
R: monoid Ff_monoidal F
nat_trans_data (fact_R F ∙ fact_R F) (fact_R F)


C: category
F: Ff C
R: monoid Ff_monoidal F
nat_trans_data (fact_R F ∙ fact_R F) (fact_R F)

  
C: category
F: Ff C
R: monoid Ff_monoidal F
f: arrow C
arrow C ⟦ (fact_R F ∙ fact_R F) f, fact_R F f ⟧


  
C: category
F: Ff C
R: monoid Ff_monoidal F
f: arrow C
μ:= monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R: Ff C
⟦ WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
    Ff_monoidal F F, F ⟧
arrow C ⟦ (fact_R F ∙ fact_R F) f, fact_R F f ⟧

  
C: category
F: Ff C
R: monoid Ff_monoidal F
f: arrow C
μ:= monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R: Ff C
⟦ WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
    Ff_monoidal F F, F ⟧
μf:= μ f: WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
  Ff_monoidal F F f -->[ identity f] F f
arrow C ⟦ (fact_R F ∙ fact_R F) f, fact_R F f ⟧

  exact (three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans μ f)).
Defined.


C: category
F: Ff C
R: monoid Ff_monoidal F
is_nat_trans (fact_R F ∙ fact_R F) (fact_R F)
  (Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul_data R)


C: category
F: Ff C
R: monoid Ff_monoidal F
is_nat_trans (fact_R F ∙ fact_R F) (fact_R F)
  (Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul_data R)

  
C: category
F: Ff C
R: monoid Ff_monoidal F
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
# (fact_R F ∙ fact_R F) γ
· Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul_data R f' =
Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul_data R f · # (fact_R F) γ

R: monoid Ff_monoidal F
f, f': arrow C

f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
μ:= monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R: Ff C
⟦ WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
    Ff_monoidal F F, F ⟧
μaxγ:= section_nt_disp_axioms_from_section_nt_disp μ f f' γ: transportf
  (mor_disp
     (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
        Ff_monoidal F F f) 
     (F f')) (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
  (section_disp_on_morphisms
     (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
        Ff_monoidal F F) γ ;; 
   μ f')%mor_disp =
(μ f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms F γ)%mor_disp
# (fact_R F ∙ fact_R F) γ
· Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul_data R f' =
Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul_data R f · # (fact_R F) γ

  μaxγ: pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
           Ff_monoidal F F f) 
        (F f')) (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms
        (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
           Ff_monoidal F F) γ ;; 
      μ f')%mor_disp) =
pr1
  (μ f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms F γ)%mor_disp
pr21 (Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul_data R f)
· pr21 (# (fact_R F) γ) = ?b
C: category
F: Ff C
R: monoid Ff_monoidal F
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
μ:= monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R: Ff C
⟦ WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
    Ff_monoidal F F, F ⟧
μaxγ:= section_nt_disp_axioms_from_section_nt_disp μ f
  f' γ: transportf
  (mor_disp
     (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
        Ff_monoidal F F f) 
     (F f')) (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
  (section_disp_on_morphisms
     (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
        Ff_monoidal F F) γ ;; 
   μ f')%mor_disp =
(μ f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms F γ)%mor_disp
μaxγb:= base_paths
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
           Ff_monoidal F F f) 
        (F f')) (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms
        (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
           Ff_monoidal F F) γ ;; 
      μ f')%mor_disp)
  (μ f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms F γ)%mor_disp
  μaxγ: pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
           Ff_monoidal F F f) 
        (F f')) (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms
        (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
           Ff_monoidal F F) γ ;; 
      μ f')%mor_disp) =
pr1
  (μ f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms F γ)%mor_disp
?b = pr21 (# (fact_R F ∙ fact_R F) γ)
 
C: category
F: Ff C
R: monoid Ff_monoidal F
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
μ:= monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R: Ff C
⟦ WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
    Ff_monoidal F F, F ⟧
μaxγ:= section_nt_disp_axioms_from_section_nt_disp μ f f' γ: transportf
  (mor_disp
     (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
        Ff_monoidal F F f) 
     (F f')) (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
  (section_disp_on_morphisms
     (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
        Ff_monoidal F F) γ ;; 
   μ f')%mor_disp =
(μ f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms F γ)%mor_disp
μaxγb:= base_paths
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
           Ff_monoidal F F f) 
        (F f')) (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms
        (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
           Ff_monoidal F F) γ ;; 
      μ f')%mor_disp)
  (μ f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms F γ)%mor_disp
  μaxγ: pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
           Ff_monoidal F F f) 
        (F f')) (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
     (section_disp_on_morphisms
        (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
           Ff_monoidal F F) γ ;; 
      μ f')%mor_disp) =
pr1
  (μ f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms F γ)%mor_disp
pr21 (# (fact_R F) γ) =
pr21 (# (fact_R F ∙ fact_R F) γ)

    reflexivity.
Qed.

Definition Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul
      {F : Ff C} (R : monoid (Ff_monoidal) F) :
    (functor_composite (fact_R F) (fact_R F)) ⟹ (fact_R F) :=
  (_,, Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul_axioms R).


C: category
F: Ff C
γ: Ff C ⟦ Ff_lcomp_unit, F ⟧
γ = Ff_l_point F


C: category
F: Ff C
γ: Ff C ⟦ Ff_lcomp_unit, F ⟧
γ = Ff_l_point F

  
C: category
F: Ff C
γ: Ff C ⟦ Ff_lcomp_unit, F ⟧
pr1 γ = pr1 (Ff_l_point F)

  
C: category
F: Ff C
γ: Ff C ⟦ Ff_lcomp_unit, F ⟧
pr1 γ ~ pr1 (Ff_l_point F)

  
C: category
F: Ff C
γ: Ff C ⟦ Ff_lcomp_unit, F ⟧
f: arrow C
pr1 γ f = pr1 (Ff_l_point F) f

  
C: category
F: Ff C
γ: Ff C ⟦ Ff_lcomp_unit, F ⟧
f: arrow C
pr1 (pr1 γ f) = pr1 (pr1 (Ff_l_point F) f)

  
C: category
F: Ff C
γ: Ff C ⟦ Ff_lcomp_unit, F ⟧
f: arrow C
test:= three_mor_comm (section_nat_trans γ f): (λ f0 : C
        ⟦ pr12 (section_functor Ff_lcomp_unit f),
        pr12 (section_functor F f) ⟧,
 pr122 (section_functor Ff_lcomp_unit f) · f0 =
 pr111 (section_nat_trans γ f)
 · pr122 (section_functor F f)
 × pr122 (pr2 (section_functor Ff_lcomp_unit f))
   · pr211 (section_nat_trans γ f) =
   f0 · pr122 (pr2 (section_functor F f)))
  (pr12 (section_nat_trans γ f))
pr1 (pr1 γ f) = pr1 (pr1 (Ff_l_point F) f)

  
C: category
F: Ff C
γ: Ff C ⟦ Ff_lcomp_unit, F ⟧
f: arrow C
test:= three_mor_comm (section_nat_trans γ f): (λ f0 : C
        ⟦ pr12 (section_functor Ff_lcomp_unit f),
        pr12 (section_functor F f) ⟧,
 pr122 (section_functor Ff_lcomp_unit f) · f0 =
 pr111 (section_nat_trans γ f)
 · pr122 (section_functor F f)
 × pr122 (pr2 (section_functor Ff_lcomp_unit f))
   · pr211 (section_nat_trans γ f) =
   f0 · pr122 (pr2 (section_functor F f)))
  (pr12 (section_nat_trans γ f))
pr122 (section_functor Ff_lcomp_unit f)
· pr12 (section_nat_trans γ f) = pr1 (pr1 γ f)
C: category
F: Ff C
γ: Ff C ⟦ Ff_lcomp_unit, F ⟧
f: arrow C
test:= three_mor_comm (section_nat_trans γ f): (λ f0 : C
        ⟦ pr12 (section_functor Ff_lcomp_unit f),
        pr12 (section_functor F f) ⟧,
 pr122 (section_functor Ff_lcomp_unit f) · f0 =
 pr111 (section_nat_trans γ f)
 · pr122 (section_functor F f)
 × pr122 (pr2 (section_functor Ff_lcomp_unit f))
   · pr211 (section_nat_trans γ f) =
   f0 · pr122 (pr2 (section_functor F f)))
  (pr12 (section_nat_trans γ f))
pr111 (section_nat_trans γ f)
· pr122 (section_functor F f) =
pr1 (pr1 (Ff_l_point F) f)

  
C: category
F: Ff C
γ: Ff C ⟦ Ff_lcomp_unit, F ⟧
f: arrow C
test:= three_mor_comm (section_nat_trans γ f): (λ f0 : C
        ⟦ pr12 (section_functor Ff_lcomp_unit f),
        pr12 (section_functor F f) ⟧,
 pr122 (section_functor Ff_lcomp_unit f) · f0 =
 pr111 (section_nat_trans γ f)
 · pr122 (section_functor F f)
 × pr122 (pr2 (section_functor Ff_lcomp_unit f))
   · pr211 (section_nat_trans γ f) =
   f0 · pr122 (pr2 (section_functor F f)))
  (pr12 (section_nat_trans γ f))
pr122 (section_functor Ff_lcomp_unit f)
· pr12 (section_nat_trans γ f) = pr1 (pr1 γ f)
 apply id_left.
  
C: category
F: Ff C
γ: Ff C ⟦ Ff_lcomp_unit, F ⟧
f: arrow C
test:= three_mor_comm (section_nat_trans γ f): (λ f0 : C
        ⟦ pr12 (section_functor Ff_lcomp_unit f),
        pr12 (section_functor F f) ⟧,
 pr122 (section_functor Ff_lcomp_unit f) · f0 =
 pr111 (section_nat_trans γ f)
 · pr122 (section_functor F f)
 × pr122 (pr2 (section_functor Ff_lcomp_unit f))
   · pr211 (section_nat_trans γ f) =
   f0 · pr122 (pr2 (section_functor F f)))
  (pr12 (section_nat_trans γ f))
pr111 (section_nat_trans γ f)
· pr122 (section_functor F f) =
pr1 (pr1 (Ff_l_point F) f)
 apply id_left.
Qed.


C: category
F: Ff C
R: monoid Ff_monoidal F
disp_Monad_laws
  (R_monad_data F (Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul R))

F: Ff C
R: monoid Ff_monoidal F
disp_Monad_laws
  (R_monad_data F (Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul R))

  
C: category
F: Ff C
R: monoid Ff_monoidal F
μ:= monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R: Ff C
⟦ WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
    Ff_monoidal F F, F ⟧
disp_Monad_laws
  (R_monad_data F (Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul R))


  
C: category
F: Ff C
R: monoid Ff_monoidal F
μ:= monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R: Ff C
⟦ WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
    Ff_monoidal F F, F ⟧
∏ c : arrow C,
disp_η (R_monad_data F (Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul R))
  (fact_R F c)
· disp_μ (R_monad_data F (Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul R)) c =
identity (fact_R F c)

∏ c : arrow C,
# (fact_R F)
  (disp_η (R_monad_data F (Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul R))
     c)
· disp_μ (R_monad_data F (Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul R)) c =
identity (fact_R F c)

μ:= monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R: Ff C
⟦ WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
    Ff_monoidal F F, F ⟧
∏ c : arrow C,
# (fact_R F)
  (disp_μ (R_monad_data F (Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul R))
     c)
· disp_μ (R_monad_data F (Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul R)) c =
disp_μ (R_monad_data F (Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul R))
  (fact_R F c)
· disp_μ (R_monad_data F (Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul R)) c

pr1

f: arrow C
pr11 (disp_η
        (R_monad_data F (Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul R))
        (fact_R F f))
· pr11 (disp_μ
          (R_monad_data F (Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul R))

    Ff_monoidal F F, F ⟧
f: arrow C
μax:= monoid_to_unit_left_law Ff_monoidal R: monoid_laws_unit_left Ff_monoidal R
pr11 (disp_η
        (R_monad_data F (Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul R))
        (fact_R F f))
· pr11 (disp_μ
          (R_monad_data F (Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul R))
          f) = identity (pr11 (fact_R F f))

    
C: category
F: Ff C
R: monoid Ff_monoidal F
μ:= monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R: Ff C
⟦ WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
    Ff_monoidal F F, F ⟧
f: arrow C
μax:= monoid_to_unit_left_law Ff_monoidal R: monoid_laws_unit_left Ff_monoidal R
μf:= μ f: WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
  Ff_monoidal F F f -->[ identity f] F f
pr11 (disp_η
        (R_monad_data F (Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul R))
        (fact_R F f))
· pr11 (disp_μ
          (R_monad_data F (Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul R))

C: category
F: Ff C
R: monoid Ff_monoidal F
μ:= monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R: Ff C
⟦ WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
    Ff_monoidal F F, F ⟧
f: arrow C
μax:= monoid_to_unit_left_law Ff_monoidal R: monoid_laws_unit_left Ff_monoidal R
μf:= μ f: WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
  Ff_monoidal F F f -->[ identity f] F f
μaxf:= eq_section_nat_trans_disp_on_morphism μax f: (WhiskeredBifunctors.rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
   Ff_monoidal F (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal) F
   (monoid_data_unit Ff_monoidal R)
 · monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R) f =
monoidal_leftunitordata Ff_monoidal F f
pr11 (disp_η
        (R_monad_data F (Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul R))
        (fact_R F f))
· pr11 (disp_μ
          (R_monad_data F (Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul R))
          f) = identity (pr11 (fact_R F f))

    
C: category
F: Ff C
R: monoid Ff_monoidal F
μ:= monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R: Ff C
⟦ WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
    Ff_monoidal F F, F ⟧
f: arrow C
μax:= monoid_to_unit_left_law Ff_monoidal R: monoid_laws_unit_left Ff_monoidal R
μf:= μ f: WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
  Ff_monoidal F F f -->[ identity f] F f
μaxf:= eq_section_nat_trans_disp_on_morphism μax f: (WhiskeredBifunctors.rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
   Ff_monoidal F (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal) F
   (monoid_data_unit Ff_monoidal R)
 · monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R) f =
monoidal_leftunitordata Ff_monoidal F f
μaxfb:= base_paths
  ((WhiskeredBifunctors.rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
      Ff_monoidal F (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal)
      F (monoid_data_unit Ff_monoidal R)
    · monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R)
     f)
  (monoidal_leftunitordata Ff_monoidal F f)
  μaxf: pr1
  ((WhiskeredBifunctors.rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
      Ff_monoidal F
      (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal) F
      (monoid_data_unit Ff_monoidal R)
    · monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R)
     f) =
pr1 (monoidal_leftunitordata Ff_monoidal F f)
pr11 (disp_η
        (R_monad_data F (Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul R))
        (fact_R F f))
· pr11 (disp_μ
          (R_monad_data F (Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul R))
          f) = identity (pr11 (fact_R F f))

f: arrow C

F: Ff C

⟦ WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects

f: arrow C

  Ff_monoidal F F f -->[

   Ff_monoidal F (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal) F
   (monoid_data_unit Ff_monoidal R)

?b =

        (R_monad_data F (Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul R))

· pr11 (disp_μ

C: category
F: Ff C
R: monoid Ff_monoidal F
μ:= monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R: Ff C

  Ff_monoidal F F f -->[ identity f] F f
μaxf:= eq_section_nat_trans_disp_on_morphism μax f: (WhiskeredBifunctors.rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
   Ff_monoidal F (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal) F
   (monoid_data_unit Ff_monoidal R)
 · monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R) f =
monoidal_leftunitordata Ff_monoidal F f
μaxfb:= base_paths
  ((WhiskeredBifunctors.rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
      Ff_monoidal F (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal)
      F (monoid_data_unit Ff_monoidal R)
    · monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R)
     f)
  (monoidal_leftunitordata Ff_monoidal F f)
  μaxf: pr1
  ((WhiskeredBifunctors.rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
      Ff_monoidal F
      (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal) F
      (monoid_data_unit Ff_monoidal R)
    · monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R)
     f) =
pr1 (monoidal_leftunitordata Ff_monoidal F f)
pr1
  ((WhiskeredBifunctors.rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
      Ff_monoidal F (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal) F
      (monoid_data_unit Ff_monoidal R)
    · monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R) f) =
pr11 (disp_η
        (R_monad_data F (Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul R))
        (fact_R F f))
· pr11 (disp_μ
          (R_monad_data F (Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul R))
          f)

C: category
F: Ff C
R: monoid Ff_monoidal F
μ:= monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R: Ff C
⟦ WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
    Ff_monoidal F F, F ⟧
∏ c : arrow C,
# (fact_R F)
  (disp_η (R_monad_data F (Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul R))
     c)
· disp_μ (R_monad_data F (Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul R)) c =
identity (fact_R F c)

⟦ WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
    Ff_monoidal F F, F ⟧
f: arrow C
# (fact_R F)
  (disp_η (R_monad_data F (Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul R))
     f)
· disp_μ (R_monad_data F (Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul R)) f =
identity (fact_R F f)

F: Ff C

μ:= monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R: Ff C
⟦ WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
    Ff_monoidal F F, F ⟧
f: arrow C
pr1
  (# (fact_R F)
     (disp_η
        (R_monad_data F (Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul R)) f)
   · disp_μ
       (R_monad_data F (Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul R)) f) =
pr1 (identity (fact_R F f))

          (R_monad_data F (Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul R))

f: arrow C

  Ff_monoidal F F f -->[ identity f] F f

 · monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R) f =

    reflexivity.
  
C: category
F: Ff C
R: monoid Ff_monoidal F
μ:= monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R: Ff C
⟦ WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
    Ff_monoidal F F, F ⟧
∏ c : arrow C,
# (fact_R F)
  (disp_μ (R_monad_data F (Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul R))
     c)
· disp_μ (R_monad_data F (Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul R)) c =
disp_μ (R_monad_data F (Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul R))
  (fact_R F c)
· disp_μ (R_monad_data F (Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul R)) c

     Ff_monoidal F
     (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
        Ff_monoidal F F) F
     (monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R)
 · monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R) f =
(WhiskeredBifunctors.rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
   Ff_monoidal F
   (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
      Ff_monoidal F F) F
   (monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R)
 · monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R) f
μaxfb:= base_paths
  ((monoidal_associatordata Ff_monoidal F F F
    · WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
        Ff_monoidal F
        (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
           Ff_monoidal F F) F
        (monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal
           R)
    · monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R)
     f)
  ((WhiskeredBifunctors.rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
      Ff_monoidal F
      (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
         Ff_monoidal F F) F
      (monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R)
    · monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R)
     f) μaxf: pr1
  ((monoidal_associatordata Ff_monoidal F F F
    · WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
        Ff_monoidal F
        (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
           Ff_monoidal F F) F
        (monoid_data_multiplication
           Ff_monoidal R)
    · monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R)
     f) =
pr1
  ((WhiskeredBifunctors.rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
      Ff_monoidal F
      (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
         Ff_monoidal F F) F
      (monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal
         R)
    · monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R)
     f)
?b =
pr11 (disp_μ
        (R_monad_data F (Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul R))
        (fact_R F f))
· pr11 (disp_μ
          (R_monad_data F (Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul R))
          f)
 
C: category
F: Ff C
R: monoid Ff_monoidal F
μ:= monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R: Ff C
⟦ WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
    Ff_monoidal F F, F ⟧
f: arrow C
μax:= monoid_to_assoc_law Ff_monoidal R: monoid_laws_assoc Ff_monoidal R
μf:= μ f: WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
  Ff_monoidal F F f -->[ identity f] F f
μaxf:= eq_section_nat_trans_disp_on_morphism μax f: (monoidal_associatordata Ff_monoidal F F F
 · WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
     Ff_monoidal F
     (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
        Ff_monoidal F F) F
     (monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R)
 · monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R) f =
(WhiskeredBifunctors.rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
   Ff_monoidal F
   (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
      Ff_monoidal F F) F
   (monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R)
 · monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R) f
μaxfb:= base_paths
  ((monoidal_associatordata Ff_monoidal F F F
    · WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
        Ff_monoidal F
        (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
           Ff_monoidal F F) F
        (monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal
           R)
    · monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R)
     f)
  ((WhiskeredBifunctors.rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
      Ff_monoidal F
      (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
         Ff_monoidal F F) F
      (monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R)
    · monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R)
     f) μaxf: pr1
  ((monoidal_associatordata Ff_monoidal F F F
    · WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
        Ff_monoidal F
        (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
           Ff_monoidal F F) F
        (monoid_data_multiplication
           Ff_monoidal R)
    · monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R)
     f) =
pr1
  ((WhiskeredBifunctors.rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
      Ff_monoidal F
      (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
         Ff_monoidal F F) F
      (monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal
         R)
    · monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R)
     f)
pr1
  (WhiskeredBifunctors.rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
     Ff_monoidal F
     (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
        Ff_monoidal F F) F
     (monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R) f ;; 
   monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R f)%mor_disp =
pr11 (disp_μ
        (R_monad_data F (Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul R))
        (fact_R F f))
· pr11 (disp_μ
          (R_monad_data F (Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul R))
          f)

      
C: category
F: Ff C
R: monoid Ff_monoidal F
μ:= monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R: Ff C
⟦ WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
    Ff_monoidal F F, F ⟧
f: arrow C
μax:= monoid_to_assoc_law Ff_monoidal R: monoid_laws_assoc Ff_monoidal R
μf:= μ f: WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
  Ff_monoidal F F f -->[ identity f] F f
μaxf:= eq_section_nat_trans_disp_on_morphism μax f: (monoidal_associatordata Ff_monoidal F F F
 · WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
     Ff_monoidal F
     (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
        Ff_monoidal F F) F
     (monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R)
 · monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R) f =
(WhiskeredBifunctors.rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
   Ff_monoidal F
   (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
      Ff_monoidal F F) F
   (monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R)
 · monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R) f
μaxfb:= base_paths
  ((monoidal_associatordata Ff_monoidal F F F
    · WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
        Ff_monoidal F
        (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
           Ff_monoidal F F) F
        (monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal
           R)
    · monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R)
     f)
  ((WhiskeredBifunctors.rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
      Ff_monoidal F
      (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
         Ff_monoidal F F) F
      (monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R)
    · monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R)
     f) μaxf: pr1
  ((monoidal_associatordata Ff_monoidal F F F
    · WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
        Ff_monoidal F
        (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
           Ff_monoidal F F) F
        (monoid_data_multiplication
           Ff_monoidal R)
    · monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R)
     f) =
pr1
  ((WhiskeredBifunctors.rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
      Ff_monoidal F
      (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
         Ff_monoidal F F) F
      (monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal
         R)
    · monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R)
     f)
pr1
  (WhiskeredBifunctors.rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
     Ff_monoidal F
     (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
        Ff_monoidal F F) F
     (monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal R) f) =
pr11 (disp_μ
        (R_monad_data F (Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul R))
        (fact_R F f))

      reflexivity.
Qed.


C: category
F: Ff C
R: monoid Ff_monoidal F
rnwfs_over F


C: category
F: Ff C
R: monoid Ff_monoidal F
rnwfs_over F

  
C: category
F: Ff C
R: monoid Ff_monoidal F
disp_Monad_laws
  (R_monad_data F (Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_mul R))

  exact (Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS_monad_laws R).
Defined.

End Ff_monoid_is_RNWFS.
